message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Create a C# WPF .NET 8.0 I/O monitor app that connects to LS XEC PLC via XGT FEnet protocol (TCP 192.168.0.50:2004)
   - Real-time display of PLC bit-level I/O data across MW100~MW501 memory regions
   - Output control: toggle individual output bits ON/OFF via UI buttons → write to PLC
   - Heartbeat: PC writes MW500 (counter + PC_READY) every cycle, reads MW501 (PLC status + PLC heartbeat)
   - User wants both read and write data displayed in real-time, with activity flicker/blink indicators
   - On disconnect, write MW500=0 (PC_READY OFF) so PLC SafetyStop engages

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **LS XGT FEnet Protocol** over TCP port 2004
   - **20-byte header**: CompanyID(10,"LSIS-XGT\0\0") + PLCInfo(2) + CPU(1,0xA0) + Source(1,0x33/0x11) + InvokeID(2) + Length(2) + Slot(1) + BCC(1)
   - **Address conversion**: Word addresses MUST convert to Byte — `%MW100` → `%MB200` (index×2), `%IW0.0.0` → `%IB0.0.0`
   - **Reserved(2)** field mandatory after cmd+dtype in data frame
   - **Count always in BYTES**: 10 WORD read = count 20
   - **Response has 4-byte padding** after cmd+dtype (reserved+status) before block_count — THIS IS THE CURRENT BUG
   - RSS command 0x0054 (read), WSS command 0x0058 (write)
   - Source: 0x33=Request(PC→PLC), 0x11=Response(PLC→PC), check response[13]
   - WPF MVVM with dark theme, TabControl (Input/Output/Servo+System tabs)
   - Dispatcher batched log updates to prevent UI thread blocking
   - PLC programs: PROG_IO_MAP, PROG_SERVO (APM_ORG/DST/STP/RST FBs), PROG_SAFETY (Watchdog+EMO)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`Features/Communication/XgtProtocol.cs`** — XGT FEnet packet builder/parser. MOST CRITICAL FILE.
     - Underwent 3 major revisions: 22B header → 20B header → address conversion + Reserved
     - Current version has address conversion (`ConvertToByteAddress`), Reserved(2) in requests, byte count conversion
     - **CURRENT BUG**: `ParseResponse` uses `appDataOffset = 24` but actual data starts at offset 28 (4 extra padding bytes in response)
     - Response format confirmed by direct TCP test:
       ```
       bytes 20-23: cmd(2) + dtype(2)
       bytes 24-27: reserved(2) + status(2) ← 4 bytes padding
       bytes 28-29: block_count(2)
       bytes 30-31: data_byte_count(2)
       bytes 32+:   actual data
       ```
     - For write response: same 4-byte padding, then block_count(2) only
     - Full current file content (with the bug at appDataOffset):
       ```csharp
       // ParseResponse currently has:
       var appDataOffset = 24;  // BUG: should be 28
       // ParseReadData reads blockCount at offset (24) but it's actually at offset 28
       // ParseWriteData same issue
       ```

   - **`Features/Communication/XgtClient.cs`** — TCP socket client with SemaphoreSlim lock, ReadWordsAsync/WriteWordsAsync, hex logging

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorViewModel.cs`** — Main ViewModel
     - Poll loop (500ms): Heartbeat write → Read inputs → Read outputs (with cache sync) → Read servo → Read system → Parse MW501
     - `ToggleOutputBitAsync(wordIndex, bitIndex)` — toggles output bit in cache, writes single WORD to PLC
     - `_outputCache[10]` — synced with PLC readback each cycle
     - MW501 parsing: PlcCommOk, PlcEmoActive, PlcServoErr, PlcWdTimeout, PlcRun, PlcHeartbeat(bit8~15)
     - `StopAndDisconnect()` writes MW500=0 before disconnect
     - Status bar shows: `PC:{count} PLC:{plcHB} | RUN/WD!/---`

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml`** — 3-tab UI
     - Input tab: green LED indicators (read-only)
     - Output tab: orange LED + **SET toggle buttons** (click to ON/OFF → PLC write)
     - Servo/System tab: blue LEDs + servo parameter display
     - Top bar: Connect/Disconnect buttons + **PLC status LEDs** (COMM, RUN, EMO, WD, SERVO)
     - Right panel: debug log with toggle/clear

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml.cs`** — Code-behind
     - `BtnOutputToggle_Click` → finds parent WordViewModel via VisualTree → calls `ToggleOutputBitAsync`
     - `FindParentWordViewModel` helper

   - **`Features/IoMonitor/MemoryMapDefinition.cs`** — Bit-level name definitions for MW0100~0501

   - **`PLC_ST/ST_UPDATE/`** — Updated PLC ST programs
     - PROG_SERVO.st: APM_ORG/DST/STP/StpEmo/RST, IF-ELSE structure (no RETURN), MW501 now includes PLC heartbeat at bit8~15
     - PROG_SAFETY.st: Watchdog (500ms), EMO, SafetyStop, output kill
     - CSV files: GVL_VARS(14), PROG_SERVO_VARS(38), PROG_SAFETY_VARS(13) — all EUC-KR encoded

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Error 1: 22-byte header (extra Reserved at [10-11])**
     - Fixed: Removed `writer.Write((ushort)0x0000)` at bytes [10-11], changed HEADER_SIZE to 20
     - Updated all parse offsets: Source [15]→[13], Length [18-19]→[16-17], Command [22-23]→[20-21], etc.
   
   - **Error 2: All addresses return 0xFFFF (error 0x0011)**
     - Root cause: TWO issues — missing Reserved(2) in data frame AND wrong address format
     - Fixed: Added Reserved(2) = 0x0000 after cmd+dtype in data frame
     - Fixed: Convert %MW→%MB (index×2) for all addresses, count in bytes not words
     - Error 0x0011 = missing Reserved field, Error 0x0012 = wrong address format (%MW vs %MB)
   
   - **Error 3: Response parsing offset wrong (CURRENT - NOT YET FIXED)**
     - Response has 4 bytes of padding (reserved+status) after cmd+dtype before block_count
     - Current code reads block_count at byte 24, but actual block_count is at byte 28
     - Direct TCP test confirmed: `00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a` where first 4 bytes are padding
     - MW500=0x0101 (heartbeat working), MW501=0x2A1E (PLC alive, EMO+SERVO_ERR+WD+RUN, PLC_HB=42)
     - User confirmed: "프로그램 켜놓으면 PLC 쪽에는 뭔가 바뀌는게 보이긴함" (PLC side shows changes = writes working, but C# UI shows nothing = parser broken)

   - **Error 4: No heartbeat write in poll loop**
     - Fixed: Added `_heartbeatCount++` + `WriteWordsAsync("%MW500", [heartbeat])` as first action in PollLoopAsync

5. Problem Solving:
   - Protocol header structure iteratively debugged through 3 versions over multiple direct TCP tests
   - Address format and Reserved field discovered via VagabondK.Protocols open-source library analysis
   - All 7 MW regions confirmed readable via direct Python TCP test
   - Write (WSS) also confirmed working — MW500 heartbeat successfully written and read back
   - Real sensor data confirmed: MW100=0x0001 (서보ON접점), MW101=0x0014 (플런저 센서)
   - **REMAINING**: ParseResponse offset bug prevents C# app from displaying data

6. All user messages:
   - "이건 다하고 확인해볼게" (will check PLC download later)
   - "기존에 있는 주소 읽히는지 테스트 하면 되지 않나?" (test with existing addresses)
   - [I/O variable list showing _00_IN00 etc.] "이런건 봐도 되지 않나" (can't we test these?)
   - "접속해서 확인해봐라" (connect and verify)
   - PC→PLC control flow description (서보MC, JOG, 원점/이동/정지/리셋)
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\ST_UPDATE 이렇게 작성되었음" (ST_UPDATE folder created)
   - "접속해서 확인해봐라" (connect and verify again)
   - Document reference table (MEMORY_MAP.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, STATION_FLOW.md, CLAUDE.md) "이거 참조하고"
   - "PLC 하트 비트 추가 했음" (added PLC heartbeat to ST code)
   - "참조해서 프로그램 수정해줘" (update program based on references)
   - Detailed MW500/MW501 communication spec table
   - "plc 프로그램 수정했는ㄷ heatbeat 들어오는지 우선 니가 확인해봐라" (PLC program updated, verify heartbeat)
   - "출력부 강제 on off 어케 하나?" (how to force output ON/OFF)
   - "출력 기능 해줘야지 그리고 서버 heat beat 는 프로그램 연결되면 무조건 토글되게" (add output control, heartbeat always on when connected)
   - "서보" (servo - mentioned wanting servo control)
   - "C# 통신 주소 정리" + detailed MW500/MW501 spec tables
   - "읽는 창 / 쓰는 창 - 다 실시간 반영 되야함, 프리커도 보고 싶은데.." (read/write windows should update real-time, want to see flicker)
   - "프로그램 켜놓으면 PLC 쪽에는 뭔가 바뀌는게 보이긴함" (PLC side shows changes when C# app runs)
   - "뭔가 안되는 느낌인데 맞제?" (something's not working right, correct?)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **CRITICAL**: Fix ParseResponse offset in XgtProtocol.cs — skip 4 extra bytes (reserved+status) in response before block_count
   - Real-time display with activity flicker/blink indicator (user requested "프리커도 보고 싶은데")
   - Servo control panel (user mentioned "서보" — buttons for Home/Move/Stop/Reset/JOG, servo MC ON/OFF)
   - Test files cleanup (test_xgt_final.py may still exist on Desktop)

8. Current Work:
   I was in the middle of fixing `ParseResponse` in `XgtProtocol.cs` when the summary was requested. The direct TCP test at the end of the conversation confirmed:
   
   ```
   Response data from byte 24: 00 00 00 00 01 00 04 00 01 01 1e 2a
   ```
   
   This shows 4 bytes of padding (00 00 00 00) before block_count (01 00) and data_byte_count (04 00). The current C# parser reads block_count at offset 24 (getting 0x0000 = padding) instead of offset 28 (where actual block_count 0x0001 is).
   
   The fix needed in `ParseResponse`:
   - Change `appDataOffset` from 24 to 28 (skip cmd+dtype+reserved+status = 20+2+2+2+2 = 28)
   - OR skip 4 bytes at the start of ParseReadData and ParseWriteData
   - Also need to handle write response similarly (write response data: `00 00 00 00 01 00` → skip 4, block_count=1 = OK)
   
   I had just read the relevant code section and was about to edit when the summary was requested.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Fix `ParseResponse` / `ParseReadData` / `ParseWriteData` in `XgtProtocol.cs` to skip the 4-byte padding in responses. This directly addresses why the C# app shows nothing despite successful PLC communication — the user confirmed "프로그램 켜놓으면 PLC 쪽에는 뭔가 바뀌는게 보이긴함" (writes work, PLC sees changes) but the UI doesn't update (reads parse incorrectly).
   
   After fixing the parser, build and have user test. Then address the remaining requests:
   - Activity flicker indicator ("프리커도 보고 싶은데")
   - Servo control panel ("서보")

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator-Desktop\2306281c-a502-45ff-89e7-31ddbf429431.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

content.text:
# Build/Publish Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: build-runner
- model: sonnet

## Role
Agent that performs .NET project build and publish, and analyzes/fixes errors when they occur.

## Input
C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\c#\AssembleMonitor\AssembleMonitor.csproj (task type + target path, defaults to current directory if omitted)
- `build` — build only
- `publish` — Release publish
- `publish win-x64` — publish with specific RID
- `clean build` — clean build
- `rebuild` — rebuild (clean + build)
- Path: `build C:\path\to\project`

## Actions

### 1. Project Discovery
- Search for `*.sln`, `*.csproj`, `*.vbproj` in specified or current directory
- If multiple found, ask user to select
- Check project SDK type (WinForms/WPF/Console/MAUI/Library, etc.)
- **Build system detection**: Check TargetFramework
  - `net9.0`, `net8.0`, `net6.0`, etc. → `dotnet` CLI
  - `v4.8`, `v4.7.2`, etc. .NET Framework → `MSBuild`

### 2. Build Execution

#### dotnet CLI (.NET Core/5+)
```bash
# Default build
dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# Clean build
dotnet clean "{project_path}" && dotnet build "{project_path}" -c Release

# MAUI Android
dotnet build -c Release -f net9.0-android -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=C:/android-sdk
```

#### MSBuild (.NET Framework)
```bash
# Find MSBuild path via vswhere
$msbuild = & "C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\Installer\vswhere.exe" -latest -requires Microsoft.Component.MSBuild -find "MSBuild\**\Bin\MSBuild.exe" | Select-Object -First 1

# Default build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /p:Configuration=Release /restore

# Clean build
& $msbuild "{project_path}" /t:Clean,Build /p:Configuration=Release /restore
```

### 3. Publish Execution
```bash
# Default publish
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release

# Self-contained (no .NET runtime needed on target)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained

# Single file
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true

# Trimmed (remove unused assemblies, reduce size)
dotnet publish "{project_path}" -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=true
```

### 4. Error Analysis & Fix
On build failure:
1. Classify error messages:
   - **CS codes** (CS0246, CS1061, etc.): Compile errors — missing references, type errors
   - **MSB codes** (MSB3073, MSB4019, etc.): Build system errors — SDK/tool issues
   - **NU codes** (NU1101, NU1605, etc.): NuGet package errors — package restore failures
   - **NETSDK codes**: SDK installation/version issues
2. Identify cause and suggest fix
3. **Fix code only after user confirmation** (no auto-fix)
4. Rebuild after fix

### 5. Result Report
```
## Build Result
- Status: Success/Failure
- Project: {name}
- Build Tool: dotnet CLI / MSBuild
- Configuration: Release | {RID}
- Output: {output path}
- Warnings: N
- Duration: X seconds
```

## Rules
- User confirmation required before fixing build errors
- Report warnings but do not auto-fix
- Automatically add AndroidSdkDirectory property for MAUI Android builds
- Clearly indicate publish output path
- Try `dotnet restore` first on NuGet restore failures
- Auto-detect MSBuild path via vswhere for .NET Framework projects

    89→                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
    90→                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    91→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
    92→                            <Ellipse.Style>
    93→                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
    94→                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
    95→                                    <Style.Triggers>
    96→                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
    97→                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
    98→                                        </DataTrigger>
    99→                                    </Style.Triggers>
   100→                                </Style>
   101→                            </Ellipse.Style>
   102→                        </Ellipse>
   103→                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
   104→
   105→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   106→                            <Ellipse.Style>
   107→                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   108→                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   109→                                    <Style.Triggers>
   110→                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
   111→                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   112→                                        </DataTrigger>
   113→                                    </Style.Triggers>
   114→                                </Style>
   115→                            </Ellipse.Style>
   116→                        </Ellipse>
   117→                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
   118→
   119→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   120→                            <Ellipse.Style>
   121→                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   122→                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   123→                                    <Style.Triggers>
   124→                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
   125→                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
   126→                                        </DataTrigger>
   127→                                    </Style.Triggers>
   128→                                </Style>
   129→                            </Ellipse.Style>
   130→                        </Ellipse>
   131→                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
   132→
   133→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   134→                            <Ellipse.Style>
   135→                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   136→                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   137→                                    <Style.Triggers>
   138→                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
   139→                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
   140→                                        </DataTrigger>
   141→                                    </Style.Triggers>
   142→                                </Style>
   143→                            </Ellipse.Style>
   144→                        </Ellipse>
   145→                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
   146→
   147→                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   148→                            <Ellipse.Style>
   149→                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   150→                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   151→                                    <Style.Triggers>
   152→                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
   153→                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
   154→                                        </DataTrigger>
   155→                                    </Style.Triggers>
   156→                                </Style>
   157→                            </Ellipse.Style>
   158→                        </Ellipse>
   159→                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   160→                    </StackPanel>
   161→                </Border>
   162→            </StackPanel>
   163→        </Border>
   164→
   165→        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
   166→        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
   167→            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   168→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   169→                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
   170→                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
   171→            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   172→
   173→            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
   174→            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
   175→                <Grid>
   176→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   177→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   178→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   179→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   180→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   181→                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
   182→                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
   183→                    </Border>
   184→                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
   185→                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
   186→                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
   187→                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
   188→                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
   189→                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
   190→                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
   191→                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
   192→                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
   193→                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
   194→                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
   195→                    </StackPanel>
   196→                </Grid>
   197→            </Border>
   198→
   199→            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
   200→            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
   201→                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>
   202→
   203→        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
   204→            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
   205→            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
   206→                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   207→                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
   208→                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   209→                            <DataTemplate>
   210→                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   211→                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   212→                                    <StackPanel>
   213→                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
   214→                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   215→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   216→                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
   217→                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
   218→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
   219→                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   220→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   221→                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
   222→                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
   223→                                        </StackPanel>
   224→                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
   225→                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
   226→                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
   227→                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
   228→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   229→                                                        <DataTemplate>
   230→                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
   231→                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
   232→                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   233→                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   234→                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
   235→                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   236→                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   237→                                                                            </DataTrigger>
   238→                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
   239→                                                                    </Style>
   240→                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
   241→                                                            </Ellipse>
   242→                                                        </DataTemplate>
   243→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   244→                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   245→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
   246→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
   247→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
   248→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
   249→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
   250→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   251→                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
   252→                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   253→                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   254→                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   255→                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   256→                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
   257→                                                                </DataTrigger>
   258→                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   259→                                                        </Style>
   260→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   261→                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
   262→                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
   263→                                        </DataGrid>
   264→                                    </StackPanel>
   265→                                </Border>
   266→                            </DataTemplate>
   267→                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   268→                    </ItemsControl>
   269→                </ScrollViewer>
   270→            </TabItem>
   271→
   272→            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
   273→            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
   274→                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   275→                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
   276→                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   277→                            <DataTemplate>
   278→                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   279→                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   280→                                    <StackPanel>
   281→                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   282→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   283→                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
   284→                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
   285→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
   286→                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   287→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   288→                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
   289→                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
   290→                                        </StackPanel>
   291→                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
   292→                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
   293→                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
   294→                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
   295→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   296→                                                        <DataTemplate>
   297→                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
   298→                                                                    Tag="{Binding}" Height="20" Width="40"
   299→                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
   300→                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
   301→                                                                <Button.Style>
   302→                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
   303→                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
   304→                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
   305→                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   306→                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
   307→                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   308→                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
   309→                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
   310→                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
   311→                                                                            </DataTrigger>
   312→                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
   313→                                                                    </Style>
   314→                                                                </Button.Style>
   315→                                                            </Button>
   316→                                                        </DataTemplate>
   317→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   318→                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   319→                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
   320→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   321→                                                        <DataTemplate>
   322→                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
   323→                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
   324→                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   325→                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   326→                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
   327→                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   328→                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
   329→                                                                            </DataTrigger>
   330→                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
   331→                                                                    </Style>
   332→                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
   333→                                                            </Ellipse>
   334→                                                        </DataTemplate>
   335→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   336→                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   337→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
   338→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
   339→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
   340→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
   341→                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
   342→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   343→                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
   344→                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   345→                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   346→                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   347→                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
   348→                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
   349→                                                                </DataTrigger>
   350→                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   351→                                                        </Style>
   352→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   353→                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
   354→                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
   355→                                        </DataGrid>
   356→                                    </StackPanel>
   357→                                </Border>
   358→                            </DataTemplate>
   359→                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   360→                    </ItemsControl>
   361→                </ScrollViewer>
   362→            </TabItem>
   363→
   364→            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
   365→            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
   366→                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   367→                    <StackPanel>
   368→                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
   369→                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
   370→                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   371→                            <StackPanel>
   372→                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
   373→                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
   374→                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
   375→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   376→                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   377→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   378→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   379→                                    </StackPanel>
   380→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   381→                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   382→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   383→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   384→                                    </StackPanel>
   385→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   386→                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   387→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   388→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   389→                                    </StackPanel>
   390→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   391→                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   392→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   393→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
   394→                                    </StackPanel>
   395→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   396→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   397→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   398→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   399→                                    </StackPanel>
   400→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   401→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   402→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   403→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   404→                                    </StackPanel>
   405→                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
   406→                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
   407→                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   408→                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   409→                                    </StackPanel>
   410→                                </UniformGrid>
   411→                            </StackPanel>
   412→                        </Border>
   413→
   414→                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
   415→                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
   416→                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   417→                                <DataTemplate>
   418→                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   419→                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
   420→                                        <StackPanel>
   421→                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
   422→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   423→                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
   424→                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
   425→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
   426→                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   427→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
   428→                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
   429→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   430→                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
   431→                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
   432→                                            </StackPanel>
   433→                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
   434→                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
   435→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
   436→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   437→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   438→                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
   439→                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
   440→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   441→                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   442→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   443→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   444→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
   445→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   446→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   447→                                                                        </Style>
   448→                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
   449→                                                                </Ellipse>
   450→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   451→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   452→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   453→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
   454→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
   455→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
   456→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
   457→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
   458→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   459→                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
   460→                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   461→                                                                <Style.Triggers>
   462→                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   463→                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
   464→                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
   465→                                                                    </DataTrigger>
   466→                                                                </Style.Triggers>
   467→                                                            </Style>
   468→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
   469→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
   470→                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
   471→                                            </DataGrid>
   472→                                        </StackPanel>
   473→                                    </Border>
   474→                                </DataTemplate>
   475→                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   476→                        </ItemsControl>
   477→                    </StackPanel>
   478→                </ScrollViewer>
   479→            </TabItem>
   480→        </TabControl>
   481→        </Grid>
   482→
   483→        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
   484→        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
   485→            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   486→                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
   487→                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
   488→                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
   489→                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
   490→                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
   491→            </StackPanel>
   492→        </Border>
   493→    </Grid>
   494→</Window>
