<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}" Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

content.text: XgtClient의 Write 처리를 확인합니다.

문제 두 가지 의심됩니다:

1. **ParseResponse 오프셋** — 방금 수정함 (24→28), 이것 때문에 읽기 데이터가 UI에 안 나왔음
2. **출력 버튼** — DataGrid 내부 Button이 첫 클릭 시 셀 선택만 되고 Click 이벤트 안 먹는 WPF 문제 + VisualTree 탐색 실패 가능성

출력 버튼 쪽을 확실하게 수정하겠습니다.

                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">

                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}"

                                                                    Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}" Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

빌드 성공입니다.

- 결과: 오류 0, 경고 0
- 출력 경로: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\c#\AssembleMonitor\bin\Release\net8.0-windows\AssembleMonitor.dll`
- 소요 시간: 1.71초

빌드 성공. 수정 사항 정리:

**1. 응답 파싱 오프셋 수정** (`XgtProtocol.cs`)
- `appDataOffset` 24 → **28** (reserved(2) + status(2) = 4바이트 패딩 건너뛰기)
- 하트비트는 MW501 직접 파싱이라 원래도 됐지만, 입력/출력 비트는 `ParseReadData`를 거치므로 이게 원인

**2. 출력 토글 버튼 수정** (`IoMonitorWindow.xaml` + `.cs`)
- DataGrid 내부 Button → `Focusable="False"` (첫 클릭 셀 선택 방지)
- `CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"` — VisualTree 탐색 대신 직접 WordViewModel 전달
- 코드비하인드에서 `btn.CommandParameter`로 WordViewModel 접근

**프로그램 재시작해서 확인해주세요.** 입력 비트(물리 버튼 누를 때)와 출력 토글 버튼 모두 동작해야 합니다.

content.text:
# Screenshot Check Agent

## Task Settings
- subagent_type: screenshot-viewer
- model: sonnet

## Role
Finds the latest screenshot from the `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder, reads it, and analyzes the content to report.

## Actions

1. Find the 1 most recent file in `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots` folder (by modified time)
2. Read the image file using Read tool
3. Analyze the screenshot content and report to the user

## Analysis Items
- Summarize visible content on screen
- Highlight any error/warning messages
- Explain related context if code is visible
- Identify UI elements

## Rules
- If no file found, report "No screenshot found"
- After analysis, advise "Let me know if any further action is needed"

content.text:
가장 최근 스크린샷 분석 결과입니다.

**파일:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots\스크린샷 2026-03-17 194316.png`

---

## 화면 요약

LS XG5000 IDE가 열려 있으며, **1c 프로젝트**의 `PROG_SAFETY` 프로그램을 편집 중입니다. 화면은 좌우 분할 뷰로 ST 소스코드(왼쪽)와 실시간 모니터 값(오른쪽)이 동시에 표시되어 있습니다.

---

## 프로그램 검사 결과 (하단 패널)

- **오류: 0개** (발견된 오류가 없습니다)
- **경고: 1개**
- **메시지: 24개**
- "발견된 오류가 없습니다. 오류 0개, 경고 11개" 로 표시됨
- 메모리 사용: 실행 10716 Bytes (4.2%, 최대 250 KB), 업로드 11632 Bytes (4.4%, 최대 255 KB)
- 자동 할당 변수 163 Bytes (0.5%, 최대 32 KB)

---

## 코드 내용 (PROG_SAFETY)

```
(* PROG_SAFETY: 안전 인터록 + Watchdog *)
(* 역할: PC 통신 감시, EMO 처리, 전출력 차단 *)
(* 실행 순서: 가장 먼저 실행 (PROG_IO_MAP, PROG_SERVO 보다 선행) *)
```

주요 로직 5개 섹션:
1. **입력 읽기** - wHeartbeat, bPcReady, bPcEmoReq, bEmoInput 읽기
2. **Watchdog 감시 (500ms 무변화 시 통신 두절)** - TON 타이머 `s_WD_TON`
3. **EMO - NC접점 반전 + PC 요청** - `s_EMO_Active`
4. **SafetyStop 판정** - WD timeout OR EMO OR NOT PC_Ready
5. **SafetyStop 시 출력 강제 OFF** - XMW200~XMW208 전부 0 세팅

---

## 모니터 값 (오른쪽 패널, 현재 하이라이트된 항목)

| 변수 | 값 |
|---|---|
| wHeartbeat | 16#0001 |
| XMW500 | 16#0101 |
| **bPcReady** | **1** (하이라이트, ON) |
| XMW500.8 | 1 |
| bPcEmoReq | 0 |
| bEmoInput | 0 / X1X0.11 = 0 |
| **s_WD_Timeout** | **1** (하이라이트) |
| bPcReady | 1, s_WD_Timeout = 1 |
| **g_SafetyStop** | **1** (하이라이트) |
| s_WD_Timeout = 1, s_EMO_Active = 1, g_PC_Ready = 0 | |
| XMW200~XMW208 | 모두 **16#0000** (출력 강제 OFF 상태) |

---

## 핵심 상태 분석

**SafetyStop이 활성화(=1) 되어 있습니다.**  
원인 분석:
- `s_WD_Timeout = 1` → Watchdog 타임아웃 발생 (PC 통신 두절 또는 Heartbeat 500ms 무변화)
- `s_EMO_Active = 1` → EMO 활성 상태
- `g_PC_Ready = 0` → PC가 준비 안 됨

결과: XMW200~XMW208 전 출력 **강제 OFF** 상태이며, 기계가 안전 정지 중입니다.

---

## 작업 컨텍스트

- 프로젝트: `_1c` (1CELL 조립기 PLC)
- PLC 기종: LSPLC (XGB-XECH)
- 현재 연결: `L, USB, 정상` (상태바 하단)
- 커서 위치: 9행 18열, 삽입 모드
- 탭: PROG_SERVO, PROG_SAFETY 모두 열려 있으며 PROG_SAFETY가 포커스

## 작업 컨텍스트

- 프로젝트: `_1c` (1CELL 조립기 PLC)
- PLC 기종: LSPLC (XGB-XECH)
- 현재 연결: `L, USB, 정상` (상태바 하단)
- 커서 위치: 9행 18열, 삽입 모드
- 탭: PROG_SERVO, PROG_SAFETY 모두 열려 있으며 PROG_SAFETY가 포커스

스크린샷 보니 **PLC 쪽 SafetyStop이 활성화** 되어 있습니다.

**원인 체인:**
1. `s_WD_Timeout = 1` — Watchdog 타임아웃 (하트비트 500ms 무변화 감지)
2. `s_EMO_Active = 1` — EMO 활성
3. `g_SafetyStop = 1` → **MW200~208 전 출력 강제 0으로 클리어**

즉, PC에서 MW200에 출력을 써도 **PLC PROG_SAFETY가 매 스캔마다 0으로 덮어씀** → 출력 토글이 안 되는 게 맞습니다.

**WD Timeout 원인:** C# 앱이 MW500에 하트비트를 쓰고 있지만 (`XMW500 = 0x0101`, `bPcReady = 1`), PROG_SAFETY의 WD 로직이 **하트비트 값 변화**를 감시합니다. 현재 `wHeartbeat = 0x0001`로 고정되어 보이는데, C# 앱에서 카운터가 제대로 증가하고 있는지 확인이 필요합니다.

**EMO도 Active** — `bEmoInput = 0`이고 NC접점 반전이니 `s_EMO_Active = 1`. 이건 EMO 스위치가 물리적으로 눌리지 않은 상태에서 NC접점이 0이면 EMO 활성으로 판정됩니다. EMO 배선이 안 된 상태인가요?

**당장 출력 테스트하려면:**
1. EMO 입력 배선 확인 (NC접점이므로 정상 시 1이어야 함)
2. 또는 PROG_SAFETY에서 일시적으로 SafetyStop 출력 클리어 부분을 주석 처리

PLC 쪽 문제가 맞습니다. C# 프로그램이 아니라 **SafetyStop이 출력을 계속 0으로 밀고 있는 것**이 원인입니다.

message.content: 실린더 / 버튼 신호는 그거랑 상관 없잖어

content.text:
맞습니다. 입력(MW100~109)은 SafetyStop과 무관하게 읽혀야 합니다. PROG_IO_MAP이 물리입력 → MW100에 매핑하니까요.

C# 앱에서 입력 비트가 안 보이면 **응답 파싱이 여전히 잘못됐을 가능성**이 높습니다. 직접 TCP로 MW100 읽어서 실제 응답 구조를 확인하겠습니다.

input.prompt:
TCP 192.168.0.50:2004 로 XGT FEnet 프로토콜 READ 패킷을 전송하여 MW100 x10 워드를 읽어주세요.

패킷 구조 (XGT FEnet, 20바이트 헤더):
- Header(20): 4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 {len_lo} {len_hi} 00 00
- Command: 54 00 (RSS read)
- DataType: 14 00 (WORD)
- Reserved: 00 00
- BlockCount: 01 00
- AddrLen: 06 00
- Address: 25 4D 42 32 30 30 (= "%MB200", MW100의 byte주소)
- ByteCount: 14 00 (= 20 bytes = 10 words)

Length 계산: cmd(2) + dtype(2) + reserved(2) + blockcount(2) + addrlen(2) + addr(6) + bytecount(2) = 18 = 0x12

전체 패킷 (38바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 12 00 00 00 54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 32 30 30 14 00

이 hex 패킷을 TCP 192.168.0.50:2004로 보내고 응답 전체를 hex dump해주세요.
특히 응답의 바이트 20부터 끝까지를 상세히 분석해주세요:
- 바이트 20-21: command
- 바이트 22-23: datatype
- 바이트 24 이후: 어디부터 blockCount(01 00)가 시작되는지 정확히 확인

1→# Serial/Network Communication Tools
     2→
     3→## Serial (RS232/RS485)
     4→- **miniterm** → `python -m serial.tools.miniterm COMport baudrate` (pyserial 3.5, in PATH)
     5→  - `python -m serial.tools.miniterm COM3 9600 --eol CR`
     6→- **plink** → `plink` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe`)
     7→  - `plink -serial COM3 -sercfg 9600,8,n,1`
     8→
     9→## TCP/UDP
    10→- **ncat** → `ncat` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap\ncat.exe`)
    11→  - `ncat 192.168.1.100 502` — TCP connect
    12→  - `ncat -u 192.168.1.100 1234` — UDP
    13→  - `ncat -l 9000` — listen mode
    14→- **nmap** → `nmap` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap\nmap.exe`)
    15→  - `nmap -sn 192.168.1.0/24` — network scan
    16→  - `nmap -p 502 192.168.1.100` — port check
    17→
    18→## Socket Relay
    19→- **winsocat** → `winsocat` (in PATH)
    20→  - Serial ↔ TCP bridge etc.
    21→
    22→## Packet Analysis
    23→- **tshark** → `tshark` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files\Wireshark\tshark.exe`)
    24→  - `tshark -i Ethernet -f "tcp port 502"` — Modbus TCP capture
    25→  - `tshark -r capture.pcap` — file analysis
    26→  - `tshark -D` — interface list
    27→
    28→## Common
    29→- COM port/IP/port info required
