input.command:
python - << 'EOF'
import socket
import time

# XGT FEnet RSS READ 패킷 (MW100 x10 워드)
# 전체 38바이트
packet = bytes([
    0x4C, 0x53, 0x49, 0x53, 0x2D, 0x58, 0x47, 0x54,  # "LSIS-XGT"
    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,                              # reserved
    0xA0, 0x33,                                          # PLC info (0x33A0)
    0x00, 0x00,                                          # CPU info
    0x12, 0x00,                                          # length = 18 (0x12)
    0x00, 0x00,                                          # frame type
    # Command body (18 bytes)
    0x54, 0x00,                                          # command: RSS (Read)
    0x14, 0x00,                                          # data type: WORD
    0x00, 0x00,                                          # reserved
    0x01, 0x00,                                          # block count = 1
    0x06, 0x00,                                          # address length = 6
    0x25, 0x4D, 0x42, 0x32, 0x30, 0x30,                 # "%MB200"
    0x14, 0x00,                                          # byte count = 20 (10 words)
])

print(f"TX 패킷 ({len(packet)} bytes):")
for i, b in enumerate(packet):
    print(f"  [{i:02d}] 0x{b:02X}", end="")
    if i == 19: print("  <- 헤더 끝")
    elif i == 21: print("  <- command")
    elif i == 23: print("  <- datatype")
    elif i == 25: print("  <- reserved")
    elif i == 27: print("  <- blockcount")
    elif i == 29: print("  <- addrlen")
    elif i == 35: print("  <- addr 끝")
    elif i == 37: print("  <- bytecount")
    else: print()

print()
print("TX HEX:", " ".join(f"{b:02X}" for b in packet))
print()

HOST = "192.168.0.50"
PORT = 2004
TIMEOUT = 3.0

try:
    sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    sock.settimeout(TIMEOUT)
    print(f"연결 시도: {HOST}:{PORT}")
    sock.connect((HOST, PORT))
    print("연결 성공")

    print("패킷 전송 중...")
    sock.sendall(packet)
    print("전송 완료")

    # 응답 수신 (최대 256바이트)
    response = b""
    try:
        while True:
            chunk = sock.recv(256)
            if not chunk:
                break
            response += chunk
            if len(response) >= 20:
                break
    except socket.timeout:
        pass

    sock.close()
    print("연결 종료")
    print()

    if response:
        print(f"RX 응답 ({len(response)} bytes):")
        print("RX HEX:", " ".join(f"{b:02X}" for b in response))
        print()
        print("=== 응답 바이트별 분석 ===")
        for i, b in enumerate(response):
            desc = ""
            if i < 4:   desc = "헤더 시그니처"
            elif i == 4: desc = "Station No"
            elif i == 5: desc = "PC No"
            elif i == 6: desc = "Reserved"
            elif i == 7: desc = "Reserved"
            elif i == 8: desc = "CPU Info"
            elif i == 9: desc = "Source"
            elif i == 10: desc = "Reserved"
            elif i == 11: desc = "Reserved"
            elif i == 12: desc = "PLC Info[0]"
            elif i == 13: desc = "PLC Info[1]"
            elif i == 14: desc = "CPU Info[0]"
            elif i == 15: desc = "CPU Info[1]"
            elif i == 16: desc = "Length[0]"
            elif i == 17: desc = "Length[1]"
            elif i == 18: desc = "FrameType[0]"
            elif i == 19: desc = "FrameType[1]"
            elif i == 20: desc = "*** Command[0]"
            elif i == 21: desc = "*** Command[1]"
            elif i == 22: desc = "*** DataType[0]"
            elif i == 23: desc = "*** DataType[1]"
            elif i == 24: desc = "--- 이후 분석 필요 [0]"
            elif i == 25: desc = "--- [1]"
            elif i == 26: desc = "--- [2]"
            elif i == 27: desc = "--- [3]"
            elif i == 28: desc = "--- [4]"
            elif i == 29: desc = "--- [5]"
            elif i >= 30: desc = f"데이터 [{i-30}]"
            print(f"  [{i:02d}] 0x{b:02X} ({b:3d})  {desc}")

        # 바이트 20부터 상세 분석
        if len(response) >= 20:
            print()
            print("=== 바이트 20 이후 상세 분석 ===")
            body = response[20:]
            print(f"Body HEX: {' '.join(f'{b:02X}' for b in body)}")

            if len(body) >= 2:
                cmd = body[0] | (body[1] << 8)
                print(f"  [20-21] Command = 0x{cmd:04X}")
            if len(body) >= 4:
                dtype = body[2] | (body[3] << 8)
                print(f"  [22-23] DataType = 0x{dtype:04X}")
            if len(body) >= 6:
                b4 = body[4] | (body[5] << 8)
                print(f"  [24-25] = 0x{b4:04X} ({b4}) -> BlockCount 또는 Reserved?")
            if len(body) >= 8:
                b6 = body[6] | (body[7] << 8)
                print(f"  [26-27] = 0x{b6:04X} ({b6})")
            if len(body) >= 10:
                b8 = body[8] | (body[9] << 8)
                print(f"  [28-29] = 0x{b8:04X} ({b8})")

            # 워드 데이터 파싱 시도 (여러 오프셋 시도)
            print()
            print("=== MW100~MW109 워드 파싱 시도 ===")
            for start_offset in [4, 6, 8]:
                if len(body) >= start_offset + 20:
                    print(f"  오프셋 +{start_offset}에서 파싱 (바이트 {20+start_offset}):")
                    for w in range(10):
                        idx = start_offset + w * 2
                        word_val = body[idx] | (body[idx+1] << 8)
                        print(f"    MW{100+w} = {word_val:5d} (0x{word_val:04X})  [{body[idx]:02X} {body[idx+1]:02X}]")
    else:
        print("응답 없음 - TIMEOUT (3초)")
        print()
        print("가능한 원인:")
        print("  1. 포트 2004가 방화벽/네트워크 장비에 의해 차단됨 (nmap filtered 상태)")
        print("  2. PLC FEnet 모듈 설정에서 허용 IP 제한")
        print("  3. FEnet 모듈 XGT(이더넷) 서비스 비활성화")
        print("  4. 패킷 헤더의 PLC Info(0xA0, 0x33) 값이 대상 PLC와 불일치")

except socket.timeout:
    print(f"연결 타임아웃 - {HOST}:{PORT} 응답 없음")
    print()
    print("가능한 원인:")
    print("  1. 포트 2004가 방화벽에 의해 차단됨")
    print("  2. FEnet 모듈 IP 설정 불일치")
    print("  3. PLC 전원 오프 또는 FEnet 모듈 이상")
except ConnectionRefusedError:
    print(f"연결 거부 - {HOST}:{PORT}")
    print()
    print("가능한 원인:")
    print("  1. 포트 2004가 닫혀 있음")
    print("  2. FEnet 서비스 비활성화")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"오류 발생: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")

EOF
input.description: XGT FEnet RSS READ 패킷 전송 및 응답 분석

input.command:
python - << 'EOF'
# 수신된 응답 분석
rx = bytes([
    0x4C, 0x53, 0x49, 0x53, 0x2D, 0x58, 0x47, 0x54,  # [0-7]  LSIS-XGT 헤더
    0x00, 0x00, 0x02, 0x01,                              # [8-11]
    0xB4, 0x11, 0x00, 0x00,                              # [12-15] PLC Info
    0x20, 0x00,                                          # [16-17] Length = 0x0020 = 32
    0x0A, 0x4D,                                          # [18-19] Frame type
    # Body (32 bytes, offset 20~51)
    0x55, 0x00,                                          # [20-21] Command = 0x0055 (RSS ACK)
    0x14, 0x00,                                          # [22-23] DataType = 0x0014 (WORD)
    0x00, 0x00,                                          # [24-25] Error = 0x0000 (OK)
    0x00, 0x00,                                          # [26-27] Reserved
    0x01, 0x00,                                          # [28-29] BlockCount = 1
    0x14, 0x00,                                          # [30-31] ByteCount = 20 (10 words)
    # 실제 워드 데이터 (20 bytes = 10 words, offset 32~51)
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW100
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW101
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW102
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW103
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW104
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW105
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW106
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW107
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW108
    0x00, 0x00,  # MW109
])

print("=" * 60)
print("XGT FEnet 응답 완전 분석")
print("=" * 60)
print()
print(f"RX 전체 ({len(rx)} bytes):")
print("HEX:", " ".join(f"{b:02X}" for b in rx))
print()

# 헤더 분석
length = rx[16] | (rx[17] << 8)
print(f"[헤더 20바이트]")
print(f"  [0-7]   시그니처: {rx[0:8].decode('ascii', errors='replace')}")
print(f"  [8-9]   예약: {rx[8]:02X} {rx[9]:02X}")
print(f"  [10-11] 서비스 타입: {rx[10]:02X} {rx[11]:02X}  (0x01=응답, 0x02=지시)")
print(f"  [12-13] PLC Info: {rx[12]:02X} {rx[13]:02X}")
print(f"  [14-15] CPU Info: {rx[14]:02X} {rx[15]:02X}")
print(f"  [16-17] Body Length = {length} bytes (0x{length:04X})")
print(f"  [18-19] Frame Type: {rx[18]:02X} {rx[19]:02X}")
print()

# Body 분석
body = rx[20:]
cmd = body[0] | (body[1] << 8)
dtype = body[2] | (body[3] << 8)
error = body[4] | (body[5] << 8)
reserved = body[6] | (body[7] << 8)
block_count = body[8] | (body[9] << 8)
byte_count = body[10] | (body[11] << 8)

print(f"[바디 (오프셋 20부터, {len(body)} bytes)]")
print(f"  [20-21] Command   = 0x{cmd:04X}  -> RSS ACK (0x0055 = RSS 읽기 응답)")
print(f"  [22-23] DataType  = 0x{dtype:04X}  -> WORD (0x0014)")
print(f"  [24-25] Error     = 0x{error:04X}  -> {'정상(NAK 없음)' if error == 0 else f'오류코드 {error}'}")
print(f"  [26-27] Reserved  = 0x{reserved:04X}")
print(f"  [28-29] BlockCount = {block_count}  (블록 수)")
print(f"  [30-31] ByteCount  = {byte_count} bytes ({byte_count//2} words)")
print()

# 워드 데이터 (오프셋 32부터)
print(f"[MW 데이터 (오프셋 32부터, {byte_count} bytes)]")
print(f"{'주소':<8} {'워드값(DEC)':>12} {'워드값(HEX)':>12} {'바이트':>12}")
print("-" * 48)
data_start = 12  # body[12] = rx[32]
for i in range(byte_count // 2):
    idx = data_start + i * 2
    word_val = body[idx] | (body[idx+1] << 8)
    abs_idx = 20 + idx
    print(f"MW{100+i:<5} {word_val:>12} {word_val:>11X}h  [{body[idx]:02X} {body[idx+1]:02X}] (rx[{abs_idx}:{abs_idx+2}])")

print()
print("=" * 60)
print("결론: 모든 MW100~MW109 값 = 0")
print("(PLC에서 해당 주소에 값이 쓰여지지 않은 상태)")
print("=" * 60)
EOF

패킷 구조 (XGT FEnet, 20바이트 헤더):
- Header(20): 4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 {len_lo} {len_hi} 00 00
- Command: 54 00 (RSS read)
- DataType: 14 00 (WORD)
- Reserved: 00 00
- BlockCount: 01 00
- AddrLen: 06 00
- Address: 25 4D 42 32 30 30 (= "%MB200", MW100의 byte주소)
- ByteCount: 14 00 (= 20 bytes = 10 words)

Length 계산: cmd(2) + dtype(2) + reserved(2) + blockcount(2) + addrlen(2) + addr(6) + bytecount(2) = 18 = 0x12

전체 패킷 (38바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 12 00 00 00 54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 32 30 30 14 00

이 hex 패킷을 TCP 192.168.0.50:2004로 보내고 응답 전체를 hex dump해주세요.
특히 응답의 바이트 20부터 끝까지를 상세히 분석해주세요:
- 바이트 20-21: command
- 바이트 22-23: datatype
- 바이트 24 이후: 어디부터 blockCount(01 00)가 시작되는지 정확히 확인

content.text:
TCP 테스트 결과 **MW100~109 전부 0x0000** — C# 앱 문제가 아니라 **PLC PROG_IO_MAP이 물리입력을 MW100에 매핑하지 못하고 있는 것**입니다. 응답 파싱 오프셋(28)은 정확합니다.

---

## PLC 담당자 검토 요청 사항

**현상:** PC에서 XGT FEnet으로 MW100~109 읽으면 전부 0x0000. 실제 센서/버튼 신호가 다수 들어오는 상태인데 MW 영역에 전혀 반영 안 됨.

**확인 요청 항목:**

1. **PROG_IO_MAP 실행 여부**
   - PROG_IO_MAP 태스크가 RUN 상태인지 확인
   - 프로그램 실행 순서에서 누락되지 않았는지

2. **VAR_EXTERNAL 선언 확인**
   - PROG_IO_MAP에서 `%MW100` ~ `%MW109` 글로벌 변수를 사용하려면 **로컬 변수 창에 VAR_EXTERNAL로 선언 필수** (ST 프로그램 규칙)
   - VAR_EXTERNAL 없으면 컴파일은 되지만 값이 안 써짐 (E0153 에러 또는 무동작)

3. **물리 I/O → MW 매핑 방향 확인**
   - `%IX0.0.x` (물리입력) → `%MW100.x` (비트 쓰기) 코드가 정상 동작하는지
   - XG5000 모니터에서 `%IX0.0.0` ~ 직접 확인 시 물리 신호가 1로 뜨는지
   - `%MW100` 워드값이 XG5000 모니터에서도 0인지 (0이면 매핑 코드 문제)

4. **EMO / SafetyStop 영향**
   - 현재 `s_WD_Timeout=1`, `s_EMO_Active=1`, `g_SafetyStop=1` 상태
   - SafetyStop이 MW200(출력)만 클리어하는지, 혹시 **MW100(입력) 매핑도 차단**하는 로직이 있는지

5. **EMO 입력 배선**
   - `bEmoInput = 0` (NC접점 반전 → EMO Active) — EMO 스위치가 미배선 상태면 항상 0 → 항상 EMO 활성
   - 테스트 단계에서 EMO 바이패스 또는 배선 필요

---

**요약:** 통신은 정상 (MW500 하트비트 R/W 확인됨). 문제는 PROG_IO_MAP에서 물리입력(%IX) → MW100 비트 매핑이 실행 안 되고 있는 것. XG5000 모니터에서 MW100 워드값이 0인지 직접 확인 부탁드립니다.

content.text: 입력/출력/서보 3개 탭의 DataGrid에 RowStyle을 추가하여 ON일 때 행 배경색을 변경합니다.

input.old_string:
<!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>
input.new_string:
<!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                    Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                    Focusable="False">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>
