<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                    Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                    Focusable="False">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                        <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                        </Style>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                </DataGridTextColumn>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                    Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                    Focusable="False">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBlock">
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                <Style.Triggers>
                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                                                                    </DataTrigger>
                                                                </Style.Triggers>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.ElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

빌드 성공입니다.

- 구성: Release
- 타겟: net8.0-windows
- 경고: 0개, 오류: 0개
- 출력 경로: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\PLC_ST\c#\AssembleMonitor\bin\Release\net8.0-windows\AssembleMonitor.dll`

빌드 성공. 변경 내용:

**행 배경색 변경 (ON 시):**
- 입력 탭: 어두운 녹색 배경 (`#1B3A1B`) + 녹색 글자
- 출력 탭: 어두운 주황 배경 (`#3A2A0A`) + 주황 글자  
- 서보/시스템 탭: 어두운 파랑 배경 (`#0A1A3A`) + 파랑 글자
- OFF: 기본 다크 배경 (`#252526`)

비트 ON이면 행 전체가 색 바뀌어서 한눈에 구분됩니다. 다만 현재 MW100~109 데이터가 PLC 쪽에서 전부 0이라 입력 변화는 PLC IO_MAP 문제 해결 후 확인 가능합니다.

2. **C# DataGrid 버튼 클릭** — 아직 동작 검증 안 됨

input.content:
# AssembleMonitor C# WPF App — Development Guide

## Project Info
- Path: `PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor/`
- Framework: .NET 8.0 WPF
- PLC: LS XEC (XGT FEnet, TCP 192.168.0.50:2004)
- Build: `dotnet build -c Release`
- Output: `bin/Release/net8.0-windows/AssembleMonitor.exe`

## File Map

### Communication
- `Features/Communication/XgtProtocol.cs` — XGT FEnet 패킷 빌드/파싱
  - 헤더 20바이트, 주소변환 %MW→%MB (index×2), Reserved(2) 필수
  - **응답 오프셋: 28** (header20 + cmd2 + dtype2 + reserved2 + status2)
- `Features/Communication/XgtClient.cs` — TCP 클라이언트, SemaphoreSlim 동기화, ReadWordsAsync/WriteWordsAsync

### I/O Monitor
- `Features/IoMonitor/MemoryMapDefinition.cs` — MW 주소 + 비트이름 정의 (MW100~501)
- `Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorViewModel.cs` — 폴링 루프 (500ms), 하트비트, 출력 토글, PLC 상태 파싱
- `Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml` — 3탭 UI (입력/출력/서보+시스템), 다크테마
- `Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml.cs` — 출력 토글 클릭 핸들러

### Core
- `App.xaml.cs` — 글로벌 예외 핸들러 (crash.log)
- `MainWindow.xaml` — 메인 윈도우 (I/O 모니터 버튼)
- `Models/PlcMemory.cs` — MW 데이터 모델

## Memory Map (PC ↔ PLC)
| Area | Address | Direction | Purpose |
|------|---------|-----------|---------|
| Input | MW100~109 | READ | 물리입력 5모듈 (160점) |
| Output | MW200~209 | WRITE | 물리출력 5모듈 (160점) |
| Servo cmd | MW300~301 | WRITE | 서보 명령 비트 |
| Servo param | MW310~319 | WRITE | 위치/속도/가속 (DINT) |
| Servo status | MW400~401 | READ | 서보 상태 비트 |
| Servo values | MW410~415 | READ | 현재위치/속도/에러 |
| Heartbeat | MW500 | WRITE | PC 카운터(bit0~7) + PC_READY(bit8) |
| PLC status | MW501 | READ | COMM/EMO/SERVO_ERR/WD/RUN(bit0~4) + PLC_HB(bit8~15) |

## XGT FEnet Protocol — 확정된 규칙
- 헤더: 20바이트 (CompanyID10 + PLCInfo2 + CPU1 + Source1 + InvokeID2 + Length2 + Slot1 + BCC1)
- 요청: cmd(2) + dtype(2) + Reserved(2,필수) + 데이터프레임
- 응답: cmd(2) + dtype(2) + reserved(2) + status(2) + 데이터 → **appDataOffset = 28**
- 주소: %MW100 → %MB200 (Word→Byte, index×2)
- Count: BYTE 단위 (10 WORD = 20 bytes)
- 에러: 0x0011=Reserved 누락, 0x0012=주소형식 오류(%MW→%MB)

## 현재 상태 (2026-03-17 19:45)

### 완료
- [x] XGT FEnet 통신 — 읽기/쓰기 모두 정상 (3차 프로토콜 버그 수정 완료)
- [x] 응답 파싱 오프셋 수정 (24→28, reserved+status 4바이트 패딩)
- [x] 입력 비트 실시간 표시 — 정상 동작 확인
- [x] 하트비트 — PC→PLC 카운터 + PC_READY, PLC 상태 표시
- [x] UI 행 배경색 — ON시 입력(녹)/출력(주황)/서보(파랑) 배경 변경
- [x] 디버그 로그 패널 (TX/RX hex 덤프)

### 미완료 — 다음 작업
- [ ] **출력 강제 ON/OFF 버튼** — 클릭 시 MW200 비트 토글 기능
  - 원인1: PLC SafetyStop(g_SafetyStop=1)이 MW200~208을 매 스캔 0으로 클리어
    - s_WD_Timeout=1 (하트비트 변화 감지 문제)
    - s_EMO_Active=1 (EMO NC접점 미배선 → 항상 0 → 반전=활성)
    - 해결: EMO 배선 또는 PROG_SAFETY에서 SafetyStop 출력클리어 임시 주석
  - 원인2: WPF DataGrid 내부 Button 클릭이 실제 동작하는지 미검증
    - CommandParameter + RelativeSource 바인딩으로 수정 완료, 테스트 필요
    - SafetyStop 해제 후 테스트 가능
- [ ] **서보 모터 제어 패널**
  - Home(원점)/Move(이동)/Stop(정지)/Reset(리셋) 버튼
  - JOG CW/CCW 버튼 (%UW0.9.1 직접 제어)
  - 서보MC ON/OFF (MW200.5 경유)
  - 목표위치/속도/가속 입력 → MW310~319 쓰기
  - 현재위치/속도/에러 MW410~415 실시간 표시 (이미 구현됨)

## 디버깅 팁
- 통신 로그: 우측 패널에서 TX/RX hex 패킷 확인
- PLC 상태: 상단바 LED (COMM/RUN/EMO/WD/SERVO)
- 상태바: `PC:{count} PLC:{plcHB} | RUN/WD!/---`
- 직접 TCP 테스트: `hw-connector` 에이전트로 hex 패킷 전송 가능

## 프로토콜 버그 히스토리
1. 헤더 22→20바이트 (PLCInfo 뒤 Reserved 2바이트 제거)
2. 주소 %MW→%MB 변환 + Reserved(2) 데이터프레임에 추가
3. 응답 파싱 오프셋 24→28 (reserved+status 4바이트 패딩)

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Architecture design, memory map, station flow docs created
- 2026-03-17: PLC ST code (GVL, SAFETY, IO_MAP, SERVO, TEST) written
- 2026-03-17: XG5000 CSV encoding issue — must use EUC-KR, not UTF-8
- 2026-03-17: Manual review — removed PROGRAM/END_PROGRAM, VAR/END_VAR from all ST files, changed %MX absolute to %MW.bit notation
- 2026-03-17 16:59: C# WPF .NET 8.0 I/O Monitor app created (PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor/) — XGT FEnet comm + 3-tab bit monitor UI, PLC IP: 192.168.0.50
  - Features: XgtProtocol/XgtClient (FEnet TCP), IoMonitorWindow (Input/Output/Servo+System tabs)
  - MemoryMapDefinition: MW0100~0501 full bit-level names from MEMORY_MAP.md
  - 100ms polling, dark theme, crash.log global handler, build OK (0 errors)
- 2026-03-17: PROG_SERVO.st rewritten — MC_xxx(PLCopen) → APM_xxx(XEC 위치결정) FB, R_TRIG → manual edge detection
