toolUseResult.originalFile:
# 1CELL Assemble Machine — PC-Based Control

## Architecture
- PLC (XEC) = Thin I/O + Servo Controller (~20KB)
- PC (C# .NET 8.0 WPF) = Main Logic Controller
- Communication: FEnet (XGT protocol), 10-20ms cycle, ~90 bytes/cycle

## File Map

### Documentation
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` — System architecture, PLC program structure, PC software design
- `MEMORY_MAP.md` — Bit-level PC↔PLC memory map (MW100~501)
- `STATION_FLOW.md` — 10 station SOL/sensor operation flows

### PLC ST Code (`PLC_ST/`)
- `GVL.st` — Global variable reference (register in XG5000 variable window, not in code)
- `PROG_SAFETY.st` — Watchdog (500ms) + EMO + output kill + PLC→PC status
- `PROG_IO_MAP.st` — Physical I/O 160 points ↔ MW bit mapping
- `PROG_SERVO.st` — PC command bits → APM_ORG/DST/STP/FLT (BASE=0,SLOT=9), JOG via %UW0.9.1
- `PROG_TEST.st` — Standalone servo test (no PC needed, reset SW → home → 360° rotate)
- `example.csv` — XG5000 variable import CSV (EUC-KR encoding template)

### C# WPF App (`PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor/`)
- `App.xaml.cs` — Global exception handler (crash.log)
- `MainWindow.xaml` — Main window (empty + I/O Monitor button)
- `Features/Communication/XgtProtocol.cs` — XGT FEnet packet build/parse
- `Features/Communication/XgtClient.cs` — TCP socket client (read/write MW words)
- `Features/IoMonitor/MemoryMapDefinition.cs` — MW address + bit name definitions (from MEMORY_MAP.md)
- `Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorViewModel.cs` — Realtime polling + bit status VM
- `Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml` — 3-tab UI (Input/Output/Servo+System) with bit indicators
- `Models/PlcMemory.cs` — MW data model

### Reference
- `XGI_XGR_XEC_XMC_Instruction_Manual_V4.0_210721_KR.pdf` — LS PLC instruction manual (1340 pages)

## XG5000 ST Programming Rules — FROM MANUAL (Ch.14)

### Code Structure
- **NO `PROGRAM...END_PROGRAM`** in ST code — program defined in XG5000 project tree
- **NO `VAR...END_VAR`** in ST code — variables registered in XG5000 variable window
- ST code = pure logic only (assignments, IF, CASE, FOR, FB calls, comments)
- Comments: `(* block *)` or `// line`
- **`RETURN` NOT supported in PROGRAM** — use IF-ELSE structure instead (RETURN only in FUNCTION)
- **VAR_EXTERNAL required**: ST programs MUST declare global variables as `VAR_EXTERNAL` in local variable window. Ladder allows direct global access, ST does NOT. Without VAR_EXTERNAL → E0153 error.
- **WORD is bit type**: Cannot use arithmetic (+, -) on WORD. Use INT/UINT for arithmetic operations.

### Direct Variable Addressing (M area)
- `%MW100` = M area 100th word (16-bit)
- `%MW100.3` = M area 100th word, bit 3 (preferred for bit access)
- `%MX1600` = M area 1600th bit = same as `%MW100.0` (100 × 16 = 1600)
- `%MD50` = M area 50th double word (32-bit)
- **Use `%MW n.bit` notation** for readability (not absolute %MX)

### I/O Variable Addressing
- `%IX0.0.2` = Input, base 0, slot 0, bit 2
- `%QX0.5.17` = Output, base 0, slot 5, bit 17
- I/O variables like `_00_IN00`, `_05_OUT12` are created by XG5000 I/O parameter setup
- Direct variables (`%I`, `%Q`, `_xx_INxx`, `_xx_OUTxx`) need no declaration

### Data Types
- Integer: SINT(8), INT(16), DINT(32), LINT(64)
- Unsigned: USINT, UINT, UDINT, ULINT
- Real: REAL(32), LREAL(64)
- Bit: BOOL, BYTE(8), WORD(16), DWORD(32), LWORD(64)
- Time: TIME (max T#49d17h2m47s295ms)
- String: STRING (max 255 chars)
- **No implicit type conversion** — must use explicit: `WORD_TO_DINT()`, `DINT_TO_LREAL()`, etc.

### Control Statements
- `IF...THEN...ELSIF...ELSE...END_IF`
- `CASE expression OF ... END_CASE` — expression must be **INT type only**
- `FOR counter := start TO end [BY step] DO ... END_FOR` — counter must be SINT/INT/DINT
- `WHILE condition DO ... END_WHILE`
- `REPEAT ... UNTIL condition END_REPEAT`
- `EXIT` — breaks innermost loop only
- `RETURN` — supported in ST (exits current program/function)

### Function Block Calling
- Formal (named params): `INST(IN := value, PT := T#1s, Q => output, ET => elapsed);`
- Informal (positional): `INST(value, T#1s, output, elapsed);`
- FB must be declared as instance variable first (in variable window)
- Access FB output: `result := INST.Q;`

### NOT Supported in ST
- BREAK, CALL, END, JMP, NEXT, RET, SBRT (extended instructions)
- ARRAY OF STRING
- Recursive function calls
- Operators as function names (OR, XOR, AND, MOD, NOT)

### Identifier Rules
- Case-insensitive (internally all UPPERCASE)
- Korean characters allowed
- Must start with letter or underscore
- No spaces

## XG5000 Variable CSV Rules — CRITICAL
- **Encoding: EUC-KR (CP949)** — NOT UTF-8. XG5000 cannot read UTF-8 CSV files.
- **Line endings: CRLF (`0D 0A`)** — LF only (`0A`) or `n` literal will cause import failure.
- Claude's Write tool outputs UTF-8 + LF → XG5000 rejects it. **Never use Write tool for CSV.**
- **Correct method**: Copy an existing working CSV (e.g. `example.csv`) and overwrite data via PowerShell `.ps1` script:
  1. Read original file bytes to preserve EUC-KR header
  2. Append ASCII data rows with explicit `0x0D 0x0A` line endings
  3. Write combined bytes via `[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes()`
  4. Must run as `.ps1` file (not inline `-Command`) to avoid bash pipe encoding corruption
- **Header (12 columns)**: `변수 종류,변수,타입,메모리 할당,초기값,리테인,사용 유무,EIP,OPC UA,HMI,모션,설명문`
- **CRITICAL**: XG5000 exports 12 columns (includes `모션` before `설명문`). 11-column CSV will fail import.
- **Variable type**: `VAR` for program-local, `VAR_GLOBAL` for globals
- **FB types** (R_TRIG, TON, MC_Home, etc.) are allowed in CSV import
- **Initial values**: leave empty (not "0" or "FALSE")
- **설명문**: leave empty

## XGT FEnet Protocol Rules (CONFIRMED)
- Header: 20 bytes (NOT 22) — CompanyID(10) + PLCInfo(2) + CPU(1) + Source(1) + InvokeID(2) + Length(2) + Slot(1) + BCC(1)
- App data: cmd(2) + dtype(2) + **Reserved(2, 0x0000)** + data_frame
- Address: Word addresses MUST convert to Byte — `%MW100` → `%MB200` (index×2), `%IW0.0.0` → `%IB0.0.0`
- Count: always in BYTES — 10 WORD read = count 20
- Source: 0x33=Request, 0x11=Response, check response[13]
- Error 0x0011: missing Reserved field, Error 0x0012: wrong address format (used %MW instead of %MB)

## Memory Map Summary
| Area | Address | Purpose | PC Direction |
|------|---------|---------|-------------|
| Input bitmap | MW100~109 | 5 input modules (10W) | READ |
| Output bitmap | MW200~209 | 5 output modules (10W) | WRITE |
| Servo cmd bits | MW300~301 | 8 cmd + 2 control bits | WRITE |
| Servo params | MW310~319 | pos/vel/accel (DINT pairs) | WRITE |
| Servo status | MW400~401 | 8 status + 5 response bits | READ |
| Servo values | MW410~415 | pos/vel/error | READ |
| Watchdog | MW500~501 | heartbeat + system flags | R/W |

## Work History
- 2026-03-17: Architecture design, memory map, station flow docs created
- 2026-03-17: PLC ST code (GVL, SAFETY, IO_MAP, SERVO, TEST) written

- 2026-03-17: PROG_SERVO.st rewritten — MC_xxx(PLCopen) → APM_xxx(XEC 위치결정) FB, R_TRIG → manual edge detection

content.text:
완료. `CLAUDE_C#.md` 생성 + `CLAUDE.md` 이력 업데이트했습니다.

**내일 작업 순서:**
1. **출력 토글** — PLC SafetyStop 해제 먼저 (EMO 배선 or PROG_SAFETY 임시 주석) → 버튼 동작 확인
2. **서보 제어 패널** — Home/Move/Stop/Reset/JOG 버튼 + 파라미터 입력 UI

message.content: 굿모님

content.text:
굿모닝! 오늘 작업 이어가시죠.

**오늘 할 일:**
1. **출력 강제 ON/OFF** — PLC SafetyStop 해제 필요 (EMO 배선 or 임시 바이패스)
2. **서보 모터 제어 패널** — Home/Move/Stop/Reset/JOG 버튼 + 파라미터 입력

PLC 쪽 SafetyStop 상태 해결됐나요? (EMO 배선 or PROG_SAFETY 수정)

message.content: 버튼 출력 다시 확인해줘라

content.text: MW200에 직접 쓰고 읽어서 SafetyStop이 아직 클리어하는지 확인하겠습니다.

input.prompt:
TCP 192.168.0.50:2004로 XGT FEnet 프로토콜 테스트 2단계를 수행해주세요.

**1단계: MW200에 0x0001 쓰기 (WSS)**
패킷 구조:
- Header(20): 4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 14 00 00 00
- Command: 58 00 (WSS write)
- DataType: 14 00 (WORD)
- Reserved: 00 00
- BlockCount: 01 00
- AddrLen: 06 00
- Address: 25 4D 42 34 30 30 (= "%MB400", MW200의 byte주소 = 200×2=400)
- ByteCount: 02 00 (1 word = 2 bytes)
- Data: 01 00 (value = 0x0001, bit0 ON)

Length = cmd(2)+dtype(2)+reserved(2)+blockcount(2)+addrlen(2)+addr(6)+bytecount(2)+data(2) = 20 = 0x14

전체 패킷 (40바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 14 00 00 00 58 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00 01 00

**2단계: 약 200ms 후 MW200 읽기 (RSS)**
패킷 (38바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 12 00 00 00 54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00

같은 TCP 연결에서 순차 실행해주세요:
1. Write 패킷 보내고 응답 hex dump
2. 200ms 대기
3. Read 패킷 보내고 응답 hex dump
4. Read 응답의 바이트 32-33 (데이터)이 01 00이면 쓰기 유지됨, 00 00이면 SafetyStop이 클리어함

결과를 상세히 알려주세요.

- Address: 25 4D 42 34 30 30 (= "%MB400", MW200의 byte주소 = 200×2=400)
- ByteCount: 02 00 (1 word = 2 bytes)
- Data: 01 00 (value = 0x0001, bit0 ON)

Length = cmd(2)+dtype(2)+reserved(2)+blockcount(2)+addrlen(2)+addr(6)+bytecount(2)+data(2) = 20 = 0x14

전체 패킷 (40바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 14 00 00 00 58 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00 01 00

**2단계: 약 200ms 후 MW200 읽기 (RSS)**
패킷 (38바이트):
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 12 00 00 00 54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00

같은 TCP 연결에서 순차 실행해주세요:
1. Write 패킷 보내고 응답 hex dump
2. 200ms 대기
3. Read 패킷 보내고 응답 hex dump
4. Read 응답의 바이트 32-33 (데이터)이 01 00이면 쓰기 유지됨, 00 00이면 SafetyStop이 클리어함

결과를 상세히 알려주세요.

content.content:
# Serial/Network Communication Tools

## Serial (RS232/RS485)
- **miniterm** → `python -m serial.tools.miniterm COMport baudrate` (pyserial 3.5, in PATH)
  - `python -m serial.tools.miniterm COM3 9600 --eol CR`
- **plink** → `plink` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files\PuTTY\plink.exe`)
  - `plink -serial COM3 -sercfg 9600,8,n,1`

## TCP/UDP
- **ncat** → `ncat` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap\ncat.exe`)
  - `ncat 192.168.1.100 502` — TCP connect
  - `ncat -u 192.168.1.100 1234` — UDP
  - `ncat -l 9000` — listen mode
- **nmap** → `nmap` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files (x86)\Nmap\nmap.exe`)
  - `nmap -sn 192.168.1.0/24` — network scan
  - `nmap -p 502 192.168.1.100` — port check

## Socket Relay
- **winsocat** → `winsocat` (in PATH)
  - Serial ↔ TCP bridge etc.

## Packet Analysis
- **tshark** → `tshark` (in PATH, `C:\Program Files\Wireshark\tshark.exe`)
  - `tshark -i Ethernet -f "tcp port 502"` — Modbus TCP capture
  - `tshark -r capture.pcap` — file analysis
  - `tshark -D` — interface list

## Common
- COM port/IP/port info required

input.command:
python3 - <<'EOF'
import socket
import time

HOST = '192.168.0.50'
PORT = 2004
TIMEOUT = 3.0

# 1단계: Write 패킷 (MW200 = %MB400, value=0x0001) - 40바이트
write_packet = bytes([
    0x4C, 0x53, 0x49, 0x53, 0x2D, 0x58, 0x47, 0x54,  # "LSIS-XGT"
    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,                            # Reserved
    0xA0, 0x33,                                        # PLC Info
    0x00, 0x00,                                        # Reserved
    0x14, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,                            # Data Length = 20
    0x58, 0x00,                                        # Command: WSS Write
    0x14, 0x00,                                        # DataType: WORD
    0x00, 0x00,                                        # Reserved
    0x01, 0x00,                                        # BlockCount: 1
    0x06, 0x00,                                        # AddrLen: 6
    0x25, 0x4D, 0x42, 0x34, 0x30, 0x30,               # "%MB400"
    0x02, 0x00,                                        # ByteCount: 2
    0x01, 0x00                                         # Data: 0x0001
])

# 2단계: Read 패킷 (MW200 = %MB400) - 38바이트
read_packet = bytes([
    0x4C, 0x53, 0x49, 0x53, 0x2D, 0x58, 0x47, 0x54,  # "LSIS-XGT"
    0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,                            # Reserved
    0xA0, 0x33,                                        # PLC Info
    0x00, 0x00,                                        # Reserved
    0x12, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00,                            # Data Length = 18
    0x54, 0x00,                                        # Command: RSS Read
    0x14, 0x00,                                        # DataType: WORD
    0x00, 0x00,                                        # Reserved
    0x01, 0x00,                                        # BlockCount: 1
    0x06, 0x00,                                        # AddrLen: 6
    0x25, 0x4D, 0x42, 0x34, 0x30, 0x30,               # "%MB400"
    0x02, 0x00                                         # ByteCount: 2
])

def hex_dump(label, data):
    print(f"\n[{label}] ({len(data)} bytes)")
    hex_str = ' '.join(f'{b:02X}' for b in data)
    print(f"  HEX: {hex_str}")
    ascii_str = ''.join(chr(b) if 32 <= b < 127 else '.' for b in data)
    print(f"  ASCII: {ascii_str}")

print("=" * 60)
print("XGT FEnet TCP 테스트 - 192.168.0.50:2004")
print("=" * 60)

try:
    sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    sock.settimeout(TIMEOUT)
    
    print(f"\n[연결] {HOST}:{PORT} 접속 시도...")
    sock.connect((HOST, PORT))
    print(f"[연결] 성공")
    
    # --- 1단계: Write ---
    print("\n--- 1단계: MW200 Write (WSS, 0x0001) ---")
    hex_dump("TX Write", write_packet)
    
    sock.sendall(write_packet)
    
    try:
        write_resp = sock.recv(256)
        hex_dump("RX Write Response", write_resp)
        
        # 응답 분석: 오류코드 위치 (byte 22-23)
        if len(write_resp) >= 24:
            err_code = (write_resp[23] << 8) | write_resp[22]
            if err_code == 0x0000:
                print("  [결과] Write 성공 (오류코드: 0x0000)")
            else:
                print(f"  [결과] Write 오류 (오류코드: 0x{err_code:04X})")
        else:
            print(f"  [결과] 응답 길이 부족 ({len(write_resp)} bytes)")
    except socket.timeout:
        print("  [결과] RX TIMEOUT (3초) - 응답 없음")
    
    # --- 200ms 대기 ---
    print("\n[대기] 200ms 대기 중...")
    time.sleep(0.2)
    
    # --- 2단계: Read ---
    print("\n--- 2단계: MW200 Read (RSS) ---")
    hex_dump("TX Read", read_packet)
    
    sock.sendall(read_packet)
    
    try:
        read_resp = sock.recv(256)
        hex_dump("RX Read Response", read_resp)
        
        # 응답 분석
        if len(read_resp) >= 34:
            err_code = (read_resp[23] << 8) | read_resp[22]
            data_lo = read_resp[32]
            data_hi = read_resp[33]
            value = (data_hi << 8) | data_lo
            
            print(f"\n  [분석]")
            print(f"    오류코드: 0x{err_code:04X}")
            print(f"    byte[32]: 0x{data_lo:02X}, byte[33]: 0x{data_hi:02X}")
            print(f"    MW200 값: 0x{value:04X} ({value})")
            
            if value == 0x0001:
                print("  [판정] 0x0001 -> Write 값 유지됨 (SafetyStop 미발동)")
            elif value == 0x0000:
                print("  [판정] 0x0000 -> SafetyStop이 bit0을 클리어함")
            else:
                print(f"  [판정] 0x{value:04X} -> 예상 외 값 (bit 상태 확인 필요)")
        else:
            print(f"  [결과] 응답 길이 부족 ({len(read_resp)} bytes) - 데이터 파싱 불가")
            if len(read_resp) >= 24:
                err_code = (read_resp[23] << 8) | read_resp[22]
                print(f"    오류코드: 0x{err_code:04X}")
    except socket.timeout:
        print("  [결과] RX TIMEOUT (3초) - 응답 없음")
    
except socket.timeout:
    print(f"\n[오류] 연결 TIMEOUT - {HOST}:{PORT} 응답 없음")
    print("  가능한 원인:")
    print("  1. PLC 전원 OFF 또는 FEnet 모듈 미설치")
    print("  2. IP 주소 오류 (PLC IP 확인 필요)")
    print("  3. 포트 2004 미사용 (XGT FEnet 기본포트: 2004)")
    print("  4. 방화벽/스위치 차단")
except ConnectionRefusedError:
    print(f"\n[오류] 연결 거부 - {HOST}:{PORT}")
    print("  가능한 원인:")
    print("  1. FEnet 모듈이 해당 포트를 열지 않음")
    print("  2. PLC가 다른 IP를 사용 중")
    print("  3. FEnet 설정에서 포트 번호 확인 필요")
except OSError as e:
    print(f"\n[오류] 네트워크 오류: {e}")
finally:
    sock.close()
    print("\n[연결] TCP 소켓 Close 완료")
    print("=" * 60)

EOF

content.text:
테스트 완료. 결과를 상세히 분석합니다.

---

## XGT FEnet TCP 테스트 결과

### 연결
- 192.168.0.50:2004 TCP 연결 성공

---

### 1단계: Write (WSS) - MW200 = 0x0001

TX (40 bytes):
```
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 14 00 00 00
58 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00 01 00
```

RX 응답 (30 bytes):
```
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 02 01 B4 11 00 00
0A 00 0A 37 59 00 14 00 00 00 00 00 01 00
```

응답 분석:
- byte[10-11]: `02 01` = 슬레이브 응답 플래그
- byte[20]: `59 00` = WSS 응답 커맨드 (0x0059)
- byte[22-23]: `14 00` = 오류코드 0x0014
- byte[28-29]: `01 00` = BlockCount 에코

**오류코드 0x0014 (십진수 20):** XGT FEnet에서 이 코드는 "정상 완료(NAK 없음)" 구조가 아니라 **응답 데이터 길이 필드 값(0x000A = 10)**과 별도로, 실제 오류 필드(byte 26-27)가 `00 00`이므로 Write 자체는 성공 처리됨.

실제 오류 필드 byte[26-27]: `00 00` = 오류 없음 (Write 성공)

---

### 2단계: Read (RSS) - MW200 읽기 (200ms 후)

TX (38 bytes):
```
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 00 00 A0 33 00 00 12 00 00 00
54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00
```

RX 응답 (34 bytes):
```
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 02 01 B4 11 00 00
0E 00 0A 3B 55 00 14 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 02 00 00 00
```

응답 분석:
- byte[20]: `55 00` = RSS 응답 커맨드 (0x0055)
- byte[26-27]: `00 00` = 오류코드 없음 (Read 성공)
- byte[28-29]: `01 00` = BlockCount
- byte[30-31]: `02 00` = ByteCount (2바이트)
- **byte[32-33]: `00 00` = MW200 값 = 0x0000**

---

### 판정

**MW200 = 0x0000**

Write로 0x0001을 설정했으나, 200ms 후 읽으면 0x0000이 됩니다.

즉, **SafetyStop 또는 PLC 로직이 bit0을 즉시 클리어하고 있습니다.**

가능한 원인:
1. PLC 프로그램에서 MW200.bit0이 특정 조건 미충족 시 매 스캔마다 강제 0으로 리셋하는 코드가 존재
2. SafetyStop 인터록이 동작 중 (안전 조건 불만족)
3. MW200이 외부 입력(HMI, 다른 마스터) 또는 OUT 코일에 의해 덮어쓰여짐
4. 200ms는 충분히 길어 스캔 내 클리어가 이미 발생

XG5000에서 MW200(%MB400) 코일 사용처를 확인하여 어떤 로직이 해당 비트를 클리어하는지 추적하시기 바랍니다.

tool_uses: 2
duration_ms: 54958</usage>

```
54 00 14 00 00 00 01 00 06 00 25 4D 42 34 30 30 02 00
```

RX 응답 (34 bytes):
```
4C 53 49 53 2D 58 47 54 00 00 02 01 B4 11 00 00
0E 00 0A 3B 55 00 14 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 02 00 00 00
```

응답 분석:
- byte[20]: `55 00` = RSS 응답 커맨드 (0x0055)

### 판정

**MW200 = 0x0000**

Write로 0x0001을 설정했으나, 200ms 후 읽으면 0x0000이 됩니다.

즉, **SafetyStop 또는 PLC 로직이 bit0을 즉시 클리어하고 있습니다.**

가능한 원인:
1. PLC 프로그램에서 MW200.bit0이 특정 조건 미충족 시 매 스캔마다 강제 0으로 리셋하는 코드가 존재
2. SafetyStop 인터록이 동작 중 (안전 조건 불만족)

4. 200ms는 충분히 길어 스캔 내 클리어가 이미 발생

XG5000에서 MW200(%MB400) 코일 사용처를 확인하여 어떤 로직이 해당 비트를 클리어하는지 추적하시기 바랍니다.

확인됐습니다. MW200에 0x0001 쓰기 → 200ms 후 읽기 = **0x0000**. 

**PLC SafetyStop이 아직 활성 상태**라서 MW200~208을 매 스캔 0으로 클리어하고 있습니다. C# 버튼이 아무리 잘 동작해도 PLC가 즉시 지워버리는 상황입니다.

**출력 강제 테스트하려면 PLC 쪽 조치 필요:**

1. **PROG_SAFETY에서 SafetyStop 출력클리어 임시 주석** — 가장 빠른 방법
   ```
   (* 테스트 시 아래 부분 주석 처리 *)
   (* IF g_SafetyStop THEN
       XMW200 := 0;
       XMW201 := 0;
       ...
       XMW208 := 0;
   END_IF; *)
   ```

2. **또는 EMO 바이패스** — `s_EMO_Active`를 강제 0으로
   - EMO NC접점이 미배선이라 항상 Active → SafetyStop 발동

3. **또는 EMO 입력 배선** — NC접점이니 정상 시 1이 들어와야 함

PLC 쪽에서 위 중 하나 처리하면 C# 출력 버튼 바로 테스트 가능합니다. XG5000에서 수정하시겠어요?

content.text:
문제 원인 명확합니다.

**29번 줄**: `g_SafetyStop := g_WD_Timeout OR g_EMO_Active OR (NOT g_PC_Ready);`

지금 3가지 모두 True:
- `g_WD_Timeout = 1` (하트비트 변화 감시)
- `g_EMO_Active = 1` (EMO NC접점 미배선 → NOT 0 = 1)
- `NOT g_PC_Ready` (WD Timeout이라 PC_Ready도 0)

→ SafetyStop = 1 → MW200~209 매 스캔 0으로 클리어

**해결 방법 2가지:**

**A. 빠른 방법 — PROG_SAFETY에서 테스트용 바이패스 추가** (XG5000에서 수정)

29번 줄을 이렇게 바꾸면 됩니다:
```
(* 테스트 모드: SafetyStop 비활성화 *)
g_SafetyStop := FALSE;
(* 원본: g_SafetyStop := g_WD_Timeout OR g_EMO_Active OR (NOT g_PC_Ready); *)
```

**B. 정석 방법 — EMO 입력을 테스트용으로 바이패스**

26번 줄:
```
(* 테스트 모드: EMO 미배선 상태에서 바이패스 *)
g_EMO_Active := FALSE;
(* 원본: g_EMO_Active := (NOT bEmoInput) OR bPcEmoReq; *)
```

XG5000에서 **A 방법**으로 수정 → 다운로드 → C# 앱에서 출력 버튼 테스트 가능합니다. 수정하시겠어요?

message.content: 다른 아이오도 같이 묶여 있나 >?

content.text:
아닙니다. **출력(MW200~209)만 클리어**합니다.

32~43번 줄 보면:
```
IF g_SafetyStop THEN
    %MW200 := 0;  ← 출력만
    ...
    %MW209 := 0;  ← 출력만
    g_bStopExec := TRUE;
END_IF;
```

- **입력(MW100~109)**: 영향 없음 — PROG_IO_MAP에서 물리입력 읽기만
- **서보 명령(MW300~301)**: 클리어 안 함 (단, `g_bStopExec=TRUE`로 PROG_SERVO에서 별도 처리 가능)
- **시스템(MW500~501)**: 영향 없음

출력만 묶여있으니 SafetyStop 바이패스하면 출력 강제 ON/OFF + 서보 릴레이 모두 살릴 수 있습니다.

message.content: MW0200 에 아웃풋을 강제로 살리고 싶은데 ...같이 묶여 있는거 아니냐 ?

content.text:
네 맞습니다. **지금 MW200은 SafetyStop에 묶여있습니다.**

PC에서 MW200에 뭘 써도 → PLC가 매 스캔(수 ms)마다 0으로 덮어씀

```
IF g_SafetyStop THEN    ← 현재 TRUE
    %MW200 := 0;         ← 이게 PC가 쓴 값을 즉시 클리어
    %MW201 := 0;
    ...
END_IF;
```

**XG5000에서 이 한 줄만 바꾸면 풀립니다:**

29번 줄:
```
(* 원본 *)
g_SafetyStop := g_WD_Timeout OR g_EMO_Active OR (NOT g_PC_Ready);

(* 테스트용 *)
g_SafetyStop := FALSE;
```

이거 수정 → PLC 다운로드하면 MW200 강제 ON/OFF 바로 됩니다.

message.content: PLC 에 수정 요청할 내용

content.text:
## PLC 수정 요청 사항

### 현상
PC(C#)에서 MW200에 출력값을 써도 PLC PROG_SAFETY가 매 스캔 0으로 클리어해서 출력 강제 ON/OFF 불가

### 원인
PROG_SAFETY 29번 줄 `g_SafetyStop` 조건 3개 모두 TRUE:
- `g_EMO_Active = 1` → EMO NC접점 미배선 (항상 0 → 반전 = 활성)
- `g_WD_Timeout = 1` → Watchdog 타임아웃
- `NOT g_PC_Ready` → 위 두 조건 때문에 연쇄 발생

### 요청 1: SafetyStop 테스트 바이패스
PROG_SAFETY 29번 줄 임시 변경:
```
(* 원본 *)
g_SafetyStop := g_WD_Timeout OR g_EMO_Active OR (NOT g_PC_Ready);

(* 테스트용 — 출력 강제 제어 가능하도록 *)
g_SafetyStop := FALSE;
```

### 요청 2: EMO 입력 처리 (배선 전 임시)
EMO 스위치 미배선 상태에서 NC접점이 0 → 항상 EMO 활성. 
배선 완료 전까지 26번 줄 임시 변경:
```
(* 원본 *)
g_EMO_Active := (NOT bEmoInput) OR bPcEmoReq;

(* 임시 — EMO 미배선 바이패스 *)
g_EMO_Active := bPcEmoReq;
```

### 수정 후 확인 방법
1. XG5000에서 수정 → PLC 다운로드
2. PC C# 앱 연결 → 출력 탭에서 비트 토글 버튼 클릭
3. MW200 값이 유지되면 성공 (XG5000 모니터에서도 확인)

### 비고
- 입력(MW100), 서보(MW300), 시스템(MW500)은 SafetyStop 영향 없음
- **출력(MW200~209)만** SafetyStop에 묶여있음
- 서보 드라이버 릴레이도 MW200 경유이므로 이거 풀려야 서보 작업 가능

        [
            new(0, "PLC_COMM_OK", "통신 정상", "시스템"),
            new(1, "PLC_EMO_ACT", "비상정지 활성", "시스템"),
            new(2, "PLC_SERVO_ERR", "서보 에러", "시스템"),
            new(3, "PLC_WD_TIMEOUT", "Watchdog 타임아웃", "시스템"),

}

content.text:
네, 전부 하드코딩입니다. 이름 편집 기능 + JSON 저장으로 바꾸겠습니다.

방향:
1. `BitViewModel`에 `Name` 편집 가능하게 변경
2. DataGrid 우측에 "편집" 버튼 컬럼 추가 → 클릭 시 이름 인라인 편집
3. 변경된 이름은 `config_iomap.json`에 저장 → 다음 실행 시 로드
4. `MemoryMapDefinition.cs`는 기본값(default)으로 유지

이 방향으로 진행할까요?

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <!-- WORD 헤더 -->
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <!-- 비트 그리드 -->
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                        <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                            <DataTemplate>
                                <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                        BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                       Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                       FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                 RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <!-- 토글 버튼 -->
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                    Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                    CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                    Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                    FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                    BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                    Focusable="False">
                                                                <Button.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Button.Style>
                                                            </Button>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                        <DataTemplate>
                                                            <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                        <Style.Triggers>
                                                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                            </DataTrigger>
                                                                        </Style.Triggers>
                                                                    </Style>
                                                                </Ellipse.Style>
                                                            </Ellipse>
                                                        </DataTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </DataTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                    </ItemsControl>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>
