toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 이름 편집용 — 보기/편집 전환 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVisibility"/>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 편집" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnEditNames_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" Tag="Input"/>
                        <Button Content="저장" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 출력 탭 — 비트 클릭으로 ON/OFF 토글 -->
            <TabItem Header="출력 (MW0200~0209)">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 편집" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnEditNames_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" Tag="Output"/>
                        <Button Content="저장" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="50">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
                                                                        Height="20" Width="40"
                                                                        FontSize="10" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
                                                                        Focusable="False">
                                                                    <Button.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Button.Style>
                                                                </Button>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="100"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                                                                       Width="200" IsReadOnly="False">
                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="1"/>
                                                                <Setter Property="Padding" Value="2,0"/>
                                                            </Style>
                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"
                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </ScrollViewer>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <!-- 서보·시스템 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="서보 / 시스템">
                <ScrollViewer VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
                        <Border Margin="4" Padding="8" Background="#252526"
                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"
                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,6"/>
                                <UniformGrid Columns="4" Rows="2">
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#F44747"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Margin="4">
                                        <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="11"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
                                                   FontSize="16" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </UniformGrid>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>

                        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
                                                                                </DataTrigger>
                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
                                                                        </Style>
                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
                                                                </Ellipse>
                                                            </DataTemplate>
                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="40"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="120"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="200"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>
                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="상태" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="50"/>
                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
                                            </DataGrid>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Border>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                        </ItemsControl>
                    </StackPanel>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        </Grid>

        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="8,4">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,20,0"/>
                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
                           Foreground="#B0D4F1"/>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</Window>

toolUseResult.originalFile:
<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1200" Height="800"
        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">

    <Window.Resources>
        <!-- ON 비트 색상 변환기 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>

        <!-- 비트 ON/OFF 색상 -->
        <Style x:Key="BitIndicator" TargetType="Border">
            <Setter Property="Width" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="Height" Value="14"/>
            <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="7"/>
            <Setter Property="Margin" Value="2,0"/>
        </Style>

        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Style.Triggers>
                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
                </DataTrigger>
            </Style.Triggers>
        </Style>

        <!-- 이름 편집용 — 보기/편집 전환 -->
        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVisibility"/>

        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
        <Style TargetType="TabControl">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="TabItem">
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#CCCCCC"/>
            <Setter Property="Template">
                <Setter.Value>
                    <ControlTemplate TargetType="TabItem">
                        <Border x:Name="Bd" Padding="12,6" Margin="1,0"
                                Background="#2D2D30" BorderThickness="1,1,1,0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46">
                            <ContentPresenter ContentSource="Header"/>
                        </Border>
                        <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                            <Trigger Property="IsSelected" Value="True">
                                <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#007ACC"/>
                            </Trigger>
                        </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
                    </ControlTemplate>
                </Setter.Value>
            </Setter>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="12"/>
            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="24"/>
        </Style>
        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="6,4"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
        </Style>
    </Window.Resources>

    <Grid>
        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
        </Grid.RowDefinitions>

        <!-- 상단: 연결 상태 -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="10,6">
            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                <Button Content="연결" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,8,0"
                        Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Content="해제" Width="70" Height="28" Margin="0,0,16,0"
                        Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                        BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                           FontSize="14" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>

                <!-- PLC 상태 인디케이터 -->
                <Border Margin="20,0,0,0" Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>

                        <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
                            <Ellipse.Style>
                                <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
                                    <Style.Triggers>
                                        <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
                                        </DataTrigger>
                                    </Style.Triggers>
                                </Style>
                            </Ellipse.Style>
                        </Ellipse>
                        <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="11" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Border>

        <!-- 메인: 좌=탭, 우=로그 -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1">
            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="5"/>
                <ColumnDefinition Width="350"/>
            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>

            <!-- 우측: 디버그 로그 -->
            <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#1B1B1B" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,4,4,4">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
                        <TextBlock Text="통신 로그 (디버그)" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                    <TextBox x:Name="TxtLog" Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding LogText, Mode=OneWay}"
                             IsReadOnly="True" TextWrapping="Wrap" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto"
                             Background="#0D0D0D" Foreground="#22CC22" FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10.5"
                             BorderThickness="0" Padding="4" TextChanged="TxtLog_TextChanged"/>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0">
                        <Button Content="{Binding LogButtonText}" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnToggleLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                        <Button Content="클리어" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnClearLog_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <!-- 좌측: GridSplitter -->
            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="5" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                          Background="#3F3F46" Cursor="SizeWE"/>

        <TabControl Grid.Column="0" Margin="4">
            <!-- 입력 탭 -->
            <TabItem Header="입력 (MW0100~0109)">
                <Grid>
                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Background="#333337" Margin="0,0,0,2">
                        <Button Content="이름 편집" Width="80" Height="24" Margin="4,3"
                                Click="BtnEditNames_Click" Background="#555" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11" Tag="Input"/>
                        <Button Content="저장" Width="60" Height="24" Margin="0,3"
                                Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                                BorderThickness="0" FontSize="11"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Border Margin="4" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="4">
                                        <StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,4">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="14"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
                                                           FontFamily="Consolas"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0,2"
                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="24">
                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
                                                            <DataTemplate>
                                                                <Ellipse Width="12" Height="12">
                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
                                                                            <Style.Triggers>

                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="유닛" Binding="{Binding Unit}" Width="80"/>

빌드 성공했습니다.

**이름 편집 기능:**
- 각 탭 상단에 "이름 편집" / "저장" 버튼 추가
- 이름 컬럼 더블클릭 → 인라인 편집 (노란색 글자 + 파란 테두리)
- 저장 → `config_iomap.json`에 저장, 다음 실행 시 자동 로드
- 기본값은 `MemoryMapDefinition.cs` 하드코딩 유지

이름이 안 맞는 건 `MemoryMapDefinition.cs`에 있는 기본값이 실제 배선과 다른 거죠? 두 가지 방법 있습니다:

1. **앱에서 직접 편집** — 이름 더블클릭 → 수정 → 저장 (방금 추가한 기능)
2. **MemoryMapDefinition.cs 기본값 수정** — 실제 배선표 주시면 일괄 업데이트

실제 배선표나 I/O 리스트 있으면 주세요, `MemoryMapDefinition.cs` 기본값을 한번에 맞춰드립니다.

message.content: 어떤게 내보내기 하는지 모르겠네..

content.text:
XG5000에서 I/O 정보 내보내는 방법:

1. **I/O 파라미터** — 프로젝트 트리 → "I/O 파라미터" 우클릭 → "내보내기" 또는 "CSV 저장"
2. **변수 목록** — "변수/설명문" 탭 → 전체 선택 → 우클릭 → "내보내기(CSV)"
3. **가장 간단한 방법** — XG5000 I/O 파라미터 화면 스크린샷 찍어주세요

또는 엑셀/메모장에 정리된 I/O 리스트가 있으면 그것도 됩니다. 사진이든 파일이든 아무거나 주시면 비교합니다.

input.content:
# Read IOP file as binary and dump
$filePath = [System.IO.Path]::Combine($env:USERPROFILE, "Desktop", "1cellAssembleMachine", "I_O 파라미터.iop")
Write-Host "Path: $filePath"
Write-Host "Exists: $([System.IO.File]::Exists($filePath))"

$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($filePath)
Write-Host "File size: $($bytes.Length) bytes"
Write-Host ""

# Hex dump first 400 bytes
Write-Host "=== HEX DUMP (first 400 bytes) ==="
for ($i = 0; $i -lt [Math]::Min(400, $bytes.Length); $i += 16) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i + 15, $bytes.Length - 1)
    $hexPart = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString("X2") }) -join " "
    $ascPart = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -ge 32 -and $_ -le 126) { [char]$_ } else { '.' } }) -join ""
    Write-Host ("{0:X4}  {1,-48}  {2}" -f $i, $hexPart, $ascPart)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== CP949 Full Text ==="
$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(949)
$text = $enc.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host $text

input.content:
# List .iop files and read as CP949
$dir = "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine"
$files = [System.IO.Directory]::GetFiles($dir, "*.iop")
Write-Host "IOP files found:"
foreach ($f in $files) {
    Write-Host "  $f"
}

if ($files.Length -eq 0) {
    Write-Host "No .iop files found"
    exit
}

$filePath = $files[0]
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Reading: $filePath"
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($filePath)
Write-Host "File size: $($bytes.Length) bytes"
Write-Host ""

# Hex dump first 500 bytes
Write-Host "=== HEX DUMP (first 500 bytes) ==="
$limit = [Math]::Min(500, $bytes.Length)
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $limit; $i += 16) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i + 15, $limit - 1)
    $chunk = $bytes[$i..$end]
    $hexPart = ($chunk | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString("X2") }) -join " "
    $ascPart = ($chunk | ForEach-Object {
        if ($_ -ge 32 -and $_ -le 126) { [char]$_ } else { "." }
    }) -join ""
    Write-Host ("{0:X4}  {1,-48}  {2}" -f $i, $hexPart, $ascPart)
}

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "=== FULL TEXT (CP949) ==="
$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(949)
$text = $enc.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host $text

## I_O 파라미터.iop 분석 결과

### 파일 포맷
- **파일 크기**: 12,896 바이트
- **헤더**: `FF FE` (UTF-16 LE BOM 형식처럼 시작) + `<< IO Parameter >>` (UTF-16 LE 문자열)
- **모듈 설명 문자열**: CP949 (EUC-KR) 인코딩
- **핀 데이터 영역**: 바이너리 이진 레코드 구조 (0x0B00 이후, 핀 1개당 16바이트)

### 슬롯 구성 (11개 모듈)

| 슬롯 | 오프셋 | 모듈 모델 | 종류 | 점수 |
|------|--------|-----------|------|------|
| 0 | 0x0098 | **XBC-DN/DP64H** | 입출력 복합 (CPU 기본 모듈) | 입력 32점 + 출력 32점 = 64점 |
| 1 | 0x018C | **XBE-DC32A** | 입력 모듈 (전류소스 싱크공용) | 32점 |
| 2 | 0x0280 | **XBE-DC32A** | 입력 모듈 (전류소스 싱크공용) | 32점 |
| 3 | 0x0374 | **XBE-DC32A** | 입력 모듈 (전류소스 싱크공용) | 32점 |
| 4 | 0x0468 | **XBE-DC32A** | 입력 모듈 (전류소스 싱크공용) | 32점 |
| 5 | 0x055C | **XBE-TN/TP32A** | 출력 모듈 (트랜지스터 싱크/소스공용) | 32점 |
| 6 | 0x0650 | **XBE-TN/TP32A** | 출력 모듈 (트랜지스터 싱크/소스공용) | 32점 |
| 7 | 0x0744 | **XBE-TN/TP32A** | 출력 모듈 (트랜지스터 싱크/소스공용) | 32점 |
| 8 | 0x0838 | **XBE-TN/TP32A** | 출력 모듈 (트랜지스터 싱크/소스공용) | 32점 |
| 9 | 0x092C | **XBF-PD02A** | 위치결정 모듈 (펄스(LD)출력형) | 2축 |
| 10 | 0x3088 | **XBF-AD04A** | 아날로그 입력 모듈 (A/D 전압/전류) | 4채널 |

### I/O 핀 이름 관련 중요 사항

**.iop 파일에는 핀별 심볼 이름(예: `_00_IN00`, `_01_IN05` 같은 변수명)이 포함되어 있지 않습니다.**

XG5000에서 I/O 파라미터 설정 시, 핀 이름(심볼)은 별도의 **변수 CSV** 또는 XG5000 프로젝트 내부 `.xgx` 파일에 저장됩니다. 이 `.iop` 파일은 다음만 포함합니다:
- 슬롯별 모듈 모델명 및 종류
- 핀별 파라미터 (입력 필터값, 출력 타입 등 바이너리 레코드)
- 위치결정/AD 모듈 동작 파라미터 (0x0A10 영역의 속도/가속 설정값)

### XG5000 변수 이름 규칙 (자동 생성)

이 구성대로 XG5000이 자동 생성하는 직접 변수 이름:

| 슬롯 | 변수 접두어 | 범위 | 예시 |
|------|-----------|------|------|
| 슬롯 0 (입력) | `_00_INxx` | IN00~IN31 | `_00_IN00` = `%IX0.0.0` |
| 슬롯 0 (출력) | `_00_OUTxx` | OUT00~OUT31 | `_00_OUT00` = `%QX0.0.0` |
| 슬롯 1 | `_01_INxx` | IN00~IN31 | `_01_IN00` = `%IX0.1.0` |
| 슬롯 2 | `_02_INxx` | IN00~IN31 | `_02_IN00` = `%IX0.2.0` |
| 슬롯 3 | `_03_INxx` | IN00~IN31 | `_03_IN00` = `%IX0.3.0` |
| 슬롯 4 | `_04_INxx` | IN00~IN31 | `_04_IN00` = `%IX0.4.0` |
| 슬롯 5 | `_05_OUTxx` | OUT00~OUT31 | `_05_OUT00` = `%QX0.5.0` |
| 슬롯 6 | `_06_OUTxx` | OUT00~OUT31 | `_06_OUT00` = `%QX0.6.0` |
| 슬롯 7 | `_07_OUTxx` | OUT00~OUT31 | `_07_OUT00` = `%QX0.7.0` |
| 슬롯 8 | `_08_OUTxx` | OUT00~OUT31 | `_08_OUT00` = `%QX0.8.0` |
| 슬롯 9 | 위치결정 `%UW0.9.x` | — | APM FB 전용 |
| 슬롯 10 | `_10_INxx` (A/D) | — | `%IW0.10.0` 등 |

**총 I/O 점수**: 입력 160점 (슬롯0: 32 + 슬롯1~4: 각 32), 출력 160점 (슬롯0: 32 + 슬롯5~8: 각 32), 위치결정 2축, A/D 4채널

| 10 | XBF-AD04A | 아날로그 입력 4ch |

---

### 문서 구조 요약

| 페이지 범위 | 내용 |
|------------|------|
| 1 | 표지 (1CELL MC_250) |
| 2~3 | 시스템 개요 (P2P, EIP, OPC UA, HMI 설정) |
| **4~43** | **전역 변수 목록** (K/M/P 어드레스 + 설명) |
| **44~46** | **I/O 파라미터** (슬롯별 모듈 구성표) |
| **47** | A/D 모듈 채널 파라미터 (XBF-AD04A) |
| **48~49** | 고속카운터 파라미터 |
| **50~54** | 위치결정 모듈 파라미터 (XBF-PD02A) |
| 55~62 | PID/온도조절 파라미터 |
| 63~ | 래더 다이어그램 (01_MAIN 등) |

---

### I/O 파라미터 (페이지 45~46) - 슬롯 구성

**베이스 0 (Base 0)**:
| 슬롯 | 모듈 | P 어드레스 범위 |
|------|------|----------------|
| **00** | XBC-DN/DP64H (DC24V, 64점 IN/OUT) | P00000~P0001F (IN), P00200~P0021F (OUT) |
| **01** | XBE-DC32A (DC24V, 32점 입력) | P00080~P0009F |
| **02** | XBE-DC32A (DC24V, 32점 입력) | P00120~P0013F |
| **03** | XBE-DC32A (DC24V, 32점 입력) | P00160~P0017F |

| **06** | XBE-TN/TP32A (트랜지스터, 32점 IN/OUT) | P00240~P0025F |
| **07** | XBE-TN/TP32A (트랜지스터, 32점 IN/OUT) | P00280~P0029F |

| **10** | XBF-AD04A (A/D 변환, 4채널) | P00400~P0043F |

---

### 전역 변수 (P 어드레스) - 주요 항목

**페이지 29~34 (lines 1754~2050)**에 모든 P 어드레스 변수 목록이 있습니다.

**슬롯 00 입력 (P00000~P0001F)**:
- P0000C~P0000F: 설명 있음(한글, 추출 시 깨짐)
- P00010~P00013: 1번 관련
- P00014~P00019: 2번 관련
- P0001A~P0001D: 관련
- P00024: LED LAMP ON/OFF (PR1)
- P00025: MC COIL ON/OFF (PR2)

**슬롯 04 입력 (P00040~P0005F)**:
- P00040~P00046: 관련
- P00050~P00056: 관련
- P0005A~P0005F: 관련

**슬롯 01 입력 (P00080~P0009F)**:
- P00080~P00083: 0.15 관련
- P00084: OK
- P00085: NG
- P00088~P0008D: 0.15 관련 (CH1, CH2 포함)
- P00090~P00093: 관련
- P00098~P0009D: 0.23 관련

**슬롯 05 출력 (P00200~P0021F)**:
- P00200: SOL, P00201: SOL
- P00202~P00203: 1번 SOL
- P00204~P00207: 2번 SOL
- P0020D: BLOWER SOL
- P00210: 0.23 BLOW SOL, P00211: 0.15 BLOW SOL

**슬롯 06 출력 (P00240~P0025F)**:
- P00240: FEEDER 2 POWER ON/OFF
- P00241: FEEDER 3 POWER ON/OFF
- P00242~P00244: FEEDER 4~6 ON/OFF
- P00245~P00246: FEEDER 2~3 RUN/STOP
- P00247~P00249: LINE FEEDER 4~6 ON/OFF
- P00258: RINO PIN FWD/BWD

---

### 주의사항

한글 변수 설명이 pdftotext 추출 시 **대부분 깨져서** 빈 문자열로 나옵니다 (PDF가 이미지 기반이거나 인코딩 문제). 영어/숫자 포함 설명(FEEDER, SOL, LED LAMP, OK/NG 등)만 정상 추출되었습니다.

한글 설명이 필요한 경우 SumatraPDF로 직접 PDF를 열어서 확인하거나, 원본 XG5000 `.xgwx` 파일(`_1c.xgwx`)에서 직접 읽는 것이 더 정확합니다.

**다음 단계 제안**: `.xgwx` 파일은 XML 기반이므로 직접 파싱하면 한글 포함 완전한 변수 목록을 얻을 수 있습니다. 원하시면 진행하겠습니다.

- P0001A~P0001D: 관련
- P00024: LED LAMP ON/OFF (PR1)
- P00025: MC COIL ON/OFF (PR2)

**슬롯 04 입력 (P00040~P0005F)**:
- P00040~P00046: 관련
- P00050~P00056: 관련
- P0005A~P0005F: 관련

**슬롯 01 입력 (P00080~P0009F)**:
- P00080~P00083: 0.15 관련
- P00084: OK
- P00085: NG
- P00088~P0008D: 0.15 관련 (CH1, CH2 포함)
- P00090~P00093: 관련
- P00098~P0009D: 0.23 관련

**슬롯 05 출력 (P00200~P0021F)**:
- P00200: SOL, P00201: SOL
- P00202~P00203: 1번 SOL
- P00204~P00207: 2번 SOL
- P0020D: BLOWER SOL
- P00210: 0.23 BLOW SOL, P00211: 0.15 BLOW SOL

**슬롯 06 출력 (P00240~P0025F)**:
- P00240: FEEDER 2 POWER ON/OFF
- P00241: FEEDER 3 POWER ON/OFF
- P00242~P00244: FEEDER 4~6 ON/OFF
- P00245~P00246: FEEDER 2~3 RUN/STOP
- P00247~P00249: LINE FEEDER 4~6 ON/OFF
- P00258: RINO PIN FWD/BWD

---

### 주의사항

한글 변수 설명이 pdftotext 추출 시 **대부분 깨져서** 빈 문자열로 나옵니다 (PDF가 이미지 기반이거나 인코딩 문제). 영어/숫자 포함 설명(FEEDER, SOL, LED LAMP, OK/NG 등)만 정상 추출되었습니다.

한글 설명이 필요한 경우 SumatraPDF로 직접 PDF를 열어서 확인하거나, 원본 XG5000 `.xgwx` 파일(`_1c.xgwx`)에서 직접 읽는 것이 더 정확합니다.

**다음 단계 제안**: `.xgwx` 파일은 XML 기반이므로 직접 파싱하면 한글 포함 완전한 변수 목록을 얻을 수 있습니다. 원하시면 진행하겠습니다.
PDF에서 한글이 대부분 깨졌습니다. `.xgwx` 파일(XG5000 프로젝트)이 있으면 XML이라 한글 완벽 추출 가능합니다. 확인해볼게요.

input.prompt:
Read and parse the XG5000 project file "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\_1c.xgwx" to extract all I/O variable names and descriptions.

This is an XML-based file. Search for:
1. All input variables (_00_IN00 ~ _04_IN31) with their Korean descriptions/comments
2. All output variables (_00_OUT00 ~ _08_OUT31) with their Korean descriptions/comments
3. Any variable definitions with P-addresses (P00000~P00400)

The file might be large, so:
- First check if it's plain XML or compressed (try reading first 200 bytes)
- If XML, search for variable definition sections using grep for patterns like "IN00", "OUT00", "_00_", "_01_", "설명" etc.
- Extract the complete list of I/O pin names with their slot, pin number, and Korean description

Output format should be organized by slot:
```
Slot 0 Input (_00_INxx):
  _00_IN00: [description]
  _00_IN01: [description]
  ...
Slot 0 Output (_00_OUTxx):
  _00_OUT00: [description]
  ...
```

Save the complete extracted I/O list to: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\IO_NAME_LIST.md

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($dst)

# 파일 전체를 UTF-16LE 텍스트로 변환 후 검색
$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host "Total chars in Unicode decode: $($text.Length)"

# 텍스트 내 키워드 검색
$keywords = @('IN0', 'OUT0', '_00_', '_01_', '_02_', 'P0000', 'VAR', 'Symbol', 'Comment', 'Desc')
foreach ($kw in $keywords) {
    $idx = $text.IndexOf($kw)
    if ($idx -ge 0) {
        $sample = $text.Substring([Math]::Max(0, $idx-20), [Math]::Min(100, $text.Length - $idx + 20))
        Write-Host "Found '$kw' at $idx`: $sample"
        Write-Host "---"
    }
}
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
# 파일 크기 재확인 및 직접 스트림 읽기
$fi = Get-Item $dst
Write-Host "File size: $($fi.Length)"

$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes($fi.Length)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()
Write-Host "Read bytes: $($bytes.Length)"

# UTF-16LE 텍스트로 변환 (BOM 건너뛰기)
# 첫 번째 유효 텍스트 위치 찾기
for ($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i += 2) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -ge 0x20 -and $bytes[$i] -le 0x7E -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x00) {
        Write-Host "UTF-16LE text starts around offset $i"
        break
    }
}

$text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
Write-Host "Text length: $($text.Length)"
Write-Host "Sample (chars 0-100):"
Write-Host $text.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(200, $text.Length))
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# XG5000 워크스페이스 파일 구조 파악: 청크 단위로 분석
# 헤더 이후 오프셋 60 부근부터 데이터 섹션 확인
Write-Host "=== Bytes 56-128 ==="
for ($i = 56; $i -lt 128; $i += 8) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i+7, $bytes.Length-1)
    $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
    Write-Host "  [$i] $hex"
}

# 16진수 전체 덤프를 파일로 저장
$sb = New-Object System.Text.StringBuilder
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i += 16) {
    $end = [Math]::Min($i+15, $bytes.Length-1)
    $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
    $ascii = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { 
        if ($_ -ge 0x20 -and $_ -le 0x7E) { [char]$_ } else { '.' } 
    }) -join ''
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("$($i.ToString('X6')): $($hex.PadRight(48))  $ascii")
}
$sb.ToString() | Out-File 'C:\Temp\hex_dump.txt' -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host "Hex dump saved to C:\Temp\hex_dump.txt"
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# 오프셋 64: 22 7A 1D 00 = 0x001D7A22 = 1,931,810 (다음 섹션 오프셋?)
# 큰 값 -> 아마 다음 섹션의 파일 포인터
# 실제 데이터 시작점 찾기: 첫 번째 비-null 데이터 블록
Write-Host "=== Scanning for non-null data blocks after offset 64 ==="
$i = 64
while ($i -lt $bytes.Length) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -ne 0x00) {
        $end = [Math]::Min($i+31, $bytes.Length-1)
        $hex = ($bytes[$i..$end] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
        Write-Host "  Non-null at [$i]: $hex"
        # 이 위치가 새 섹션 시작인지 확인
        # 다음 null 블록 찾기
        $j = $i
        while ($j -lt $bytes.Length -and $bytes[$j] -ne 0x00) { $j++ }
        Write-Host "  Block ends at $j (length $($j-$i))"
        $i = $j
    } else {
        $i++
    }
    if ($i -gt 500) { break }
}
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# 오프셋 64: 22 7A 1D 00 - little endian int32 = ?
$val64 = [System.BitConverter]::ToInt32($bytes, 64)
Write-Host "Value at offset 64: $val64 (0x$($val64.ToString('X8')))"

# XG5000 xgwx는 구조화된 바이너리 포맷
# IFF-like chunk 구조 가능성: chunk_type(4) + chunk_size(4) + data
# 헤더 이후 첫 번째 실제 데이터 청크 위치 계산
# 헤더가 58 47 00 04 02 00 FF FE FF 15 = 10바이트
# 다음 4바이트: 00 47 00 35... -> UTF-16 "XG5000" 문자열
# 문자열 끝 파악
Write-Host "`n=== Looking for structure after the title string ==="
# UTF-16 NULL 종결자 찾기 (00 00)
for ($i = 8; $i -lt 200; $i += 2) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -eq 0x00 -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x00) {
        Write-Host "Double-null (string end?) at offset $i"
        # 다음 non-null 청크
        $j = $i + 2
        while ($j -lt 200 -and $bytes[$j] -eq 0x00) { $j++ }
        if ($j -lt 200) {
            $hex = ($bytes[$j..([Math]::Min($j+15, $bytes.Length-1))] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString('X2') }) -join ' '
            Write-Host "  Next data at $j`: $hex"
        }
    }
}
EOF

input.command:
powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$dst = 'C:\Temp\_1c_copy.xgwx'
$stream = [System.IO.File]::Open($dst, [System.IO.FileMode]::Open, [System.IO.FileAccess]::Read, [System.IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$reader = New-Object System.IO.BinaryReader($stream)
$bytes = $reader.ReadBytes(15204)
$reader.Close()
$stream.Close()

# gzip 데이터는 오프셋 138(0x8A)에서 시작
# 실제 gzip 시그니처(1F 8B) 위치 찾기
for ($i = 0; $i -lt 200; $i++) {
    if ($bytes[$i] -eq 0x1F -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x8B) {
        Write-Host "gzip signature found at offset $i"
        break
    }
}
# gzip 데이터 추출 (오프셋 138부터 끝까지, tail 226 제외)
$gzStart = 138
$gzLen = 14840  # Physical Size
Write-Host "Extracting gzip from offset $gzStart, length $gzLen"
$gzBytes = $bytes[$gzStart..($gzStart + $gzLen - 1)]
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Temp\data.gz', $gzBytes)
Write-Host "Saved C:\Temp\data.gz ($($gzBytes.Length) bytes)"
EOF

except Exception as e:

    # zlib raw deflate (skip gzip header 10 bytes)
    raw_start = actual_gz_offset + 10
    try:

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re, base64, zlib

with open(r'C:\Temp\xgwx_content.xml', 'rb') as f:
    txt = f.read().decode('utf-8')

sym_matches = list(re.finditer(r'<Symbols[^>]*>(.*?)</Symbols>', txt, re.DOTALL))
print(f'Total Symbols sections: {len(sym_matches)}')

for i, m in enumerate(sym_matches):
    raw = m.group(1).strip()
    if not raw:
        continue
    print(f'\n=== Symbols[{i}] ===')
    try:
        decoded = base64.b64decode(raw)
        print(f'Base64 decoded: {len(decoded)} bytes, header: {decoded[:8].hex()}')
        
        # BZip2 시그니처 확인 (42 5A 68 = BZh)
        if decoded[:3] == b'BZh':
            import bz2
            decompressed = bz2.decompress(decoded)
            print(f'BZip2 decompressed: {len(decompressed)} bytes')
            try:
                text = decompressed.decode('utf-8')
            except:
                text = decompressed.decode('utf-16-le')
            print('Content preview:', text[:500])
            
            # 변수명 패턴 검색
            patterns = ['_IN', '_OUT', 'P000', '%IX', '%QX', 'AT %', 'VAR_GLOBAL']
            for pat in patterns:
                if pat in text:
                    idx = text.find(pat)
                    print(f'  Found "{pat}": ...{text[max(0,idx-20):idx+60]}...')
        else:
            # zlib 시도
            try:
                d = zlib.decompress(decoded)
                print(f'zlib: {len(d)} bytes')
                print('Content:', d[:200])
            except:
                print('Not zlib')
                print('First 32 bytes:', decoded[:32])
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error: {e}')

import re, base64, bz2, sys

with open(r'C:\Temp\xgwx_content.xml', 'rb') as f:
    txt = f.read().decode('utf-8')

sym_matches = list(re.finditer(r'<Symbols[^>]*>(.*?)</Symbols>', txt, re.DOTALL))
raw0 = sym_matches[0].group(1).strip()
raw0 = sym_matches[0].group(1).strip()
decoded0 = base64.b64decode(raw0)
decomp0 = bz2.decompress(decoded0)
content = decomp0.decode('utf-16-le')

RECORD_SEP = '\ufeff\u04ffGL50\ufeff\u08ff'
records = content.split(RECORD_SEP)

io_vars = []
for rec in records[1:]:  # 첫 번째는 헤더
    # 변수명: 첫 번째 \x06\x00 전까지
    name_end = rec.find('\x06\x00')
    if name_end < 0:
        name_end = 50
    var_name = rec[:name_end].strip('\x00')
    
    # I/O 변수만 필터링 (_IN, _OUT 포함하거나 %IX, %QX 주소 포함)
    # 주소 패턴: \ufeff\u08ff%IX 또는 %QX
    addr_match = re.search(r'\ufeff\u08ff(%[IQ]X[\d.]+)', rec)
    addr = addr_match.group(1) if addr_match else ''
    
    # 코멘트: \ufeff\u00ff\ufeff\u08ff 다음
    comment_match = re.search(r'\ufeff\u00ff\ufeff\u08ff(.+?)(?:\ufeff|\x00\x00)', rec)
    comment = comment_match.group(1).strip('\x00') if comment_match else ''
    
    if addr or ('_IN' in var_name) or ('_OUT' in var_name):
        io_vars.append((var_name, addr, comment))

sys.stdout.buffer.write(f'IO variables found: {len(io_vars)}\n'.encode('utf-8'))
for v in io_vars[:20]:
    line = f'{v[0]:<20} {v[1]:<15} {v[2]}\n'
    sys.stdout.buffer.write(line.encode('utf-8'))
" 2>&1

import re, base64, bz2, sys

with open(r'C:\Temp\xgwx_content.xml', 'rb') as f:
    txt = f.read().decode('utf-8')

sym_matches = list(re.finditer(r'<Symbols[^>]*>(.*?)</Symbols>', txt, re.DOTALL))
raw0 = sym_matches[0].group(1).strip()
decoded0 = base64.b64decode(raw0)
decomp0 = bz2.decompress(decoded0)
content = decomp0.decode('utf-16-le')

# 분리자 패턴: \ufeff 뒤에 xNN FF (길이 인코딩 마커)
# 실제 패턴: \ufeff + chr(length<<8 | 0xFF) + 실제 문자열
# 모든 필드를 \ufeff 구분자로 분리
def split_fields(s):
    """U+FEFF로 시작하는 필드들을 분리"""
    parts = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(s):
        if s[i] == '\ufeff' and i+1 < len(s):
            marker = ord(s[i+1])
            # 마커 하이바이트가 길이
            length = marker >> 8
            if length == 0:
                # 마커 타입 확인 후 필드 종료
                parts.append(('MARKER', marker))
                i += 2
            else:
                # 다음 length 문자가 필드 값
                field_start = i + 2
                field_end = field_start + length
                if field_end <= len(s):
                    parts.append(('FIELD', s[field_start:field_end]))
                i = field_end
        else:
            i += 1
    return parts

RECORD_SEP = '\ufeff\u04ffGL50\ufeff'
records = content.split(RECORD_SEP)

io_vars = []
for rec in records[1:]:
    # 변수명: 첫 \x06\x00 전
    name_end = rec.find('\x06\x00')
    if name_end < 0:
        continue
    var_name = rec[:name_end]
    
    # 전체 레코드에서 \ufeff 필드 파싱
    fields = []
    i = name_end
    while i < len(rec):
        if i < len(rec) and rec[i] == '\ufeff' and i+1 < len(rec):
            marker = ord(rec[i+1])
            length = (marker & 0xFF00) >> 8
            if length > 0 and i+2+length <= len(rec):
                field_val = rec[i+2:i+2+length]
                fields.append(field_val)
                i += 2 + length
            else:
                i += 2
        else:
            i += 1
    
    # 필드에서 주소(%IX, %QX)와 코멘트 찾기
    addr = ''
    comment = ''
    for f in fields:
        if f.startswith('%IX') or f.startswith('%QX'):
            addr = f
        elif ('\uC785' in f or '\uC785' in f or  # 입
              '\uCD9C' in f or  # 출
              any(ord(c) > 0xAC00 for c in f)):  # 한글
            if not comment and len(f) > 2:
                comment = f
    
    if '_IN' in var_name or '_OUT' in var_name:
        io_vars.append((var_name, addr, comment))

sys.stdout.buffer.write(f'IO vars: {len(io_vars)}\n'.encode('utf-8'))
for v in io_vars[:30]:
    line = f'{v[0]:<20} {v[1]:<15} {v[2]}\n'
    sys.stdout.buffer.write(line.encode('utf-8'))

import re, base64, bz2, sys

with open(r'C:\Temp\xgwx_content.xml', 'rb') as f:
    txt = f.read().decode('utf-8')

sym_matches = list(re.finditer(r'<Symbols[^>]*>(.*?)</Symbols>', txt, re.DOTALL))
raw0 = sym_matches[0].group(1).strip()
decoded0 = base64.b64decode(raw0)
decomp0 = bz2.decompress(decoded0)
content = decomp0.decode('utf-16-le')

RECORD_SEP = '\ufeff\u04ffGL50\ufeff\u08ff'
records = content.split(RECORD_SEP)

io_vars = {}  # 중복 제거를 위해 dict 사용
for rec in records[1:]:
    # 변수명: \x06\x00 전까지
    name_end = rec.find('\x06\x00')
    if name_end < 0:
        continue
    var_name = rec[:name_end]
    
    # 변수명 클린업 (ASCII + 한글만 유지)
    clean_name = ''.join(c for c in var_name if (0x20 <= ord(c) <= 0x7E) or ord(c) >= 0xAC00)
    
    if not ('_IN' in clean_name or '_OUT' in clean_name):
        continue
    
    # \ufeff 필드 파싱
    fields = []
    i = name_end
    while i < len(rec):
        if rec[i] == '\ufeff' and i+1 < len(rec):
            marker = ord(rec[i+1])
            length = (marker & 0xFF00) >> 8
            if length > 0 and i+2+length <= len(rec):
                field_val = rec[i+2:i+2+length]
                fields.append(field_val)
                i += 2 + length
            else:
                i += 2
        else:
            i += 1
    
    addr = ''
    comment = ''
    for f in fields:
        if f.startswith('%IX') or f.startswith('%QX'):
            if not addr:
                addr = f
        elif any(ord(c) > 0xAC00 for c in f) and not comment and len(f) >= 4:
            comment = f
    
    if clean_name not in io_vars:
        io_vars[clean_name] = (addr, comment)

sys.stdout.buffer.write(f'Unique IO vars: {len(io_vars)}\n'.encode('utf-8'))

# 슬롯별 정렬
sorted_vars = sorted(io_vars.items(), key=lambda x: x[0])

current_slot = None
for name, (addr, comment) in sorted_vars:
    m = re.match(r'_(\d+)_(IN|OUT)(\d+)', name)
    if m:
        slot = int(m.group(1))
        direction = m.group(2)
        pin = int(m.group(3))
        slot_dir = f'Slot {slot} {direction}'
        if slot_dir != current_slot:
            sys.stdout.buffer.write(f'\n--- {slot_dir} ---\n'.encode('utf-8'))
            current_slot = slot_dir
        line = f'  {name:<16} {addr:<15} {comment}\n'
        sys.stdout.buffer.write(line.encode('utf-8'))
